    16	class SortableModel(models.Model):
    17	    sort_order = models.IntegerField(editable=False, db_index=True, null=True)
    18	
    19	    class Meta:
    20	        abstract = True
    21	
    22	    def get_ordering_queryset(self):
    23	        raise NotImplementedError("Unknown ordering queryset")
    24	
    25	    @staticmethod
    26	    def get_max_sort_order(qs):
    27	        existing_max = qs.aggregate(Max("sort_order"))
    28	        existing_max = existing_max.get("sort_order__max")
    29	        return existing_max
    30	
    31	    def save(self, *args, **kwargs):
    32	        if self.pk is None:
    33	            qs = self.get_ordering_queryset()
    34	            existing_max = self.get_max_sort_order(qs)
    35	            self.sort_order = 0 if existing_max is None else existing_max + 1
    36	        super().save(*args, **kwargs)
    37	
    38	    @transaction.atomic
    39	    def delete(self, *args, **kwargs):
    40	        if self.sort_order is not None:
    41	            qs = self.get_ordering_queryset()
    42	            qs.filter(sort_order__gt=self.sort_order).update(
    43	                sort_order=F("sort_order") - 1
    44	            )
    45	        super().delete(*args, **kwargs)

    51	class PublishedQuerySet(models.QuerySet[T]):
    52	    def published(self):
    53	        today = datetime.datetime.now(tz=datetime.UTC)
    54	        return self.filter(
    55	            Q(published_at__lte=today) | Q(published_at__isnull=True),
    56	            is_published=True,
    57	        )
    58	
    59	
    60	PublishableManager = models.Manager.from_queryset(PublishedQuerySet)

    63	class PublishableModel(models.Model):
    64	    published_at = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    65	    is_published = models.BooleanField(default=False)
    66	
    67	    objects: Any = PublishableManager()
    68	
    69	    class Meta:
    70	        abstract = True
    71	
    72	    @property
    73	    def is_visible(self):
    74	        return self.is_published and (
    75	            self.published_at is None
    76	            or self.published_at <= datetime.datetime.now(tz=datetime.UTC)
    77	        )

    80	class ModelWithMetadata(models.Model):
    81	    private_metadata = JSONField(
    82	        blank=True, db_default={}, default=dict, encoder=CustomJsonEncoder
    83	    )
    84	    metadata = JSONField(
    85	        blank=True, db_default={}, default=dict, encoder=CustomJsonEncoder
    86	    )
    87	
    88	    class Meta:
    89	        indexes: list[PostgresIndex] = [
    90	            GinIndex(fields=["private_metadata"], name="%(class)s_p_meta_idx"),
    91	            GinIndex(fields=["metadata"], name="%(class)s_meta_idx"),
    92	        ]
    93	        abstract = True
    94	
    95	    def get_value_from_private_metadata(self, key: str, default: Any = None) -> Any:
    96	        return self.private_metadata.get(key, default)
    97	
    98	    def store_value_in_private_metadata(self, items: dict):
    99	        if not self.private_metadata:
   100	            self.private_metadata = {}
   101	        self.private_metadata.update(items)
   102	
   103	    def clear_private_metadata(self):
   104	        self.private_metadata = {}
   105	
   106	    def delete_value_from_private_metadata(self, key: str) -> bool:
   107	        if key in self.private_metadata:
   108	            del self.private_metadata[key]
   109	            return True
   110	        return False
   111	
   112	    def get_value_from_metadata(self, key: str, default: Any = None) -> Any:
   113	        return self.metadata.get(key, default)
   114	
   115	    def store_value_in_metadata(self, items: dict):
   116	        if not self.metadata:
   117	            self.metadata = {}

   153	class EventPayloadManager(models.Manager["EventPayload"]):
   154	    @transaction.atomic
   155	    def create_with_payload_file(self, payload: str) -> "EventPayload":
   156	        obj = super().create()
   157	        obj.save_payload_file(payload)
   158	        return obj
   159	
   160	    @transaction.atomic
   161	    def bulk_create_with_payload_files(
   162	        self, objs: Iterable["EventPayload"], payloads=Iterable[str]
   163	    ) -> list["EventPayload"]:
   164	        created_objs = self.bulk_create(objs)
   165	        for obj, payload_data in zip(created_objs, payloads, strict=False):
   166	            obj.save_payload_file(payload_data, save_instance=False)
   167	        self.bulk_update(created_objs, ["payload_file"])
   168	        return created_objs

   171	class EventPayload(models.Model):
   172	    PAYLOADS_DIR = "payloads"
   173	
   174	    payload = models.TextField(default="")
   175	    payload_file = models.FileField(
   176	        storage=private_storage, upload_to=PAYLOADS_DIR, null=True
   177	    )
   178	    created_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)
   179	
   180	    objects = EventPayloadManager()
   181	
   182	    # TODO (PE-568): change typing of return payload to `bytes` to avoid unnecessary decoding.
   183	    def get_payload(self):
   184	        if self.payload_file:
   185	            with self.payload_file.open("rb") as f:
   186	                payload_data = f.read()
   187	                return payload_data.decode("utf-8")
   188	        return self.payload
   189	
   190	    def save_payload_file(self, payload_data: str, save_instance=True):
   191	        payload_bytes = payload_data.encode("utf-8")
   192	        prefix = get_random_string(length=12)
   193	        file_name = f"{self.pk}.json"
   194	        file_path = safe_join(prefix, file_name)
   195	        self.payload_file.save(
   196	            file_path, ContentFile(payload_bytes), save=save_instance
   197	        )
   198	
   199	    def save_as_file(self):
   200	        payload_data = self.payload
   201	        self.payload = ""
   202	        self.save()
   203	        self.save_payload_file(payload_data)

    29	class ProductsQueryset(models.QuerySet):
    30	    def published(self, channel: Channel):
    31	        from .models import ProductChannelListing
    32	
    33	        if not channel.is_active:
    34	            return self.none()
    35	        today = datetime.datetime.now(tz=datetime.UTC)
    36	        channel_listings = (
    37	            ProductChannelListing.objects.using(self.db)
    38	            .filter(
    39	                Q(published_at__lte=today) | Q(published_at__isnull=True),
    40	                channel_id=channel.id,
    41	                is_published=True,
    42	            )
    43	            .values("id")
    44	        )
    45	        return self.filter(Exists(channel_listings.filter(product_id=OuterRef("pk"))))
    46	
    47	    def not_published(self, channel: Channel):
    48	        today = datetime.datetime.now(tz=datetime.UTC)
    49	        return self.annotate_publication_info(channel).filter(
    50	            Q(published_at__gt=today) & Q(is_published=True)
    51	            | Q(is_published=False)
    52	            | Q(is_published__isnull=True)
    53	        )
    54	
    55	    def published_with_variants(self, channel: Channel):
    56	        from .models import ProductVariant, ProductVariantChannelListing
    57	
    58	        if not channel.is_active:
    59	            return self.none()
    60	        variant_channel_listings = (
    61	            ProductVariantChannelListing.objects.using(self.db)
    62	            .filter(
    63	                channel_id=channel.id,
    64	                price_amount__isnull=False,
    65	            )
    66	            .values("id")
    67	        )
    68	        variants = ProductVariant.objects.using(self.db).filter(
    69	            Exists(variant_channel_listings.filter(variant_id=OuterRef("pk")))
    70	        )
    71	        return self.published(channel).filter(
    72	            Exists(variants.filter(product_id=OuterRef("pk")))
    73	        )
    74	
    75	    def visible_to_user(
    76	        self,
    77	        requestor: Union["User", "App", None],
    78	        channel: Channel | None,
    79	        limited_channel_access: bool,
    80	    ):
    81	        """Determine which products should be visible to user.
    82	
    83	        For user without permission we require channel to be passed to determine which
    84	        products are visible to user.
    85	        For user with permission we can return:
    86	        - all products if the channel is not passed and the query is not limited
    87	          to the provided channel.
    88	            (channel=None, limited_channel_access=False)
    89	        - no products if the channel is not passed and the query is limited
    90	          to the provided channel.
    91	            (channel=None, limited_channel_access=True)
    92	        - all products assigned to the channel if the channel is passed and
    93	          the query is limited to the provided channel.
    94	            (channel=Channel, limited_channel_access=True)
    95	        """
    96	        from .models import ALL_PRODUCTS_PERMISSIONS, ProductChannelListing
    97	
    98	        if has_one_of_permissions(requestor, ALL_PRODUCTS_PERMISSIONS):
    99	            if limited_channel_access:
   100	                if channel:
   101	                    channel_listings = (
   102	                        ProductChannelListing.objects.using(self.db)
   103	                        .filter(channel_id=channel.id)
   104	                        .values("id")
   105	                    )
   106	                    return self.filter(
   107	                        Exists(channel_listings.filter(product_id=OuterRef("pk")))
   108	                    )
   109	                return self.none()
   110	            return self.all()
   111	        if not channel:
   112	            return self.none()
   113	        return self.published_with_variants(channel)

   118	    def annotate_is_published(self, channel: Channel):
   119	        from .models import ProductChannelListing

   121	        query = Subquery(

   126	        return self.annotate(

   158	    def sort_by_attribute(self, attribute_pk: int | str, descending: bool = False):
   159	        """Sort a query set by the values of the given product attribute.
   160	
   161	        :param attribute_pk: The database ID (must be a numeric) of the attribute
   162	                             to sort by.
   163	        :param descending: The sorting direction.
   164	        """
   165	        from ..attribute.models import (
   166	            AssignedProductAttributeValue,
   167	            AttributeProduct,
   168	            AttributeValue,
   169	        )
   170	
   171	        qs: models.QuerySet = self
   172	        # If the passed attribute ID is valid, execute the sorting
   173	        if not (isinstance(attribute_pk, int) or attribute_pk.isnumeric()):
   174	            return qs.annotate(
   175	                concatenated_values_order=Value(
   176	                    None, output_field=models.IntegerField()
   177	                ),
   178	                concatenated_values=Value(None, output_field=models.CharField()),
   179	            )
   180	
   181	        qs = qs.annotate(
   182	            # Implicit `GROUP BY` required for the `StringAgg` aggregation
   183	            grouped_ids=Count("id"),
   184	            # String aggregation of the attribute's values to efficiently sort them
   185	            concatenated_values=Case(
   186	                # If the product has no association data but has
   187	                # the given attribute associated to its product type,
   188	                # then consider the concatenated values as empty (non-null).
   189	                When(
   190	                    Exists(
   191	                        AttributeProduct.objects.using(self.db).filter(
   192	                            product_type_id=OuterRef("product_type_id"),
   193	                            attribute_id=attribute_pk,
   194	                        )
   195	                    )
   196	                    & ~Exists(
   197	                        AssignedProductAttributeValue.objects.using(self.db).filter(
   198	                            product_id=OuterRef("id"), value__attribute_id=attribute_pk
   199	                        )
   200	                    ),
   201	                    then=Value(""),
   202	                ),
   203	                default=StringAgg(
   204	                    F("attributevalues__value__name"),
   205	                    filter=Q(attributevalues__value__attribute_id=attribute_pk),
   206	                    delimiter=",",
   207	                    ordering=(
   208	                        [
   209	                            f"attributevalues__value__{field_name}"
   210	                            for field_name in AttributeValue._meta.ordering or []
   211	                        ]
   212	                    ),
   213	                ),
   214	                output_field=models.CharField(),
   215	            ),
   216	            concatenated_values_order=Case(
   217	                # Make the products having no such attribute be last in the sorting
   218	                When(concatenated_values=None, then=2),
   219	                # Put the products having an empty attribute value at the bottom of
   220	                # the other products.
   221	                When(concatenated_values="", then=1),
   222	                # Put the products having an attribute value to be always at the top
   223	                default=0,
   224	                output_field=models.IntegerField(),
   225	            ),
   226	        )
   227	
   228	        # Sort by concatenated_values_order then
   229	        # Sort each group of products (0, 1, 2, ...) per attribute values
   230	        # Sort each group of products by name,
   231	        # if they have the same values or not values
   232	        ordering = "-" if descending else ""
   233	        return qs.order_by(
   234	            f"{ordering}concatenated_values_order",
   235	            f"{ordering}concatenated_values",
   236	            f"{ordering}name",
   237	        )

   240	        common_fields = (

   246	            "variants__channel_listings__channel",
   247	            "channel_listings__channel",
   248	            "product_type__attributeproduct",
   249	        )
   250	        if single_object:
   251	            return self.prefetch_related(*common_fields)
   252	        return self.prefetch_related("collections", "category", *common_fields)

258	class ProductVariantQueryset(models.QuerySet):
   259	    def annotate_quantities(self):
   260	        """Annotate the queryset with quantity-related fields.
   261	
   262	        This method annotates the queryset with the following fields:
   263	        - `quantity`: The total quantity in stock for each product variant.
   264	        - `quantity_allocated`: The total quantity allocated from the stock
   265	          for each product variant.
   266	        - `available_quantity`: The available quantity for each product variant,
   267	          which is calculated as `quantity - quantity_allocated`.
   268	        """
   269	
   270	        from saleor.warehouse.models import Allocation
   271	
   272	        allocations_subquery = (
   273	            Allocation.objects.using(self.db)
   274	            .filter(stock__product_variant=OuterRef("pk"))
   275	            .values("stock__product_variant")
   276	            .annotate(total_allocated=Coalesce(Sum("quantity_allocated"), 0))
   277	            .values("total_allocated")
   278	        )
   279	
   280	        return self.annotate(
   281	            quantity=Coalesce(Sum("stocks__quantity"), Value(0)),
   282	            quantity_allocated=Coalesce(
   283	                Subquery(allocations_subquery, output_field=models.IntegerField()),
   284	                Value(0),
   285	            ),
   286	            available_quantity=Case(
   287	                When(quantity_allocated=None, then=F("quantity")),
   288	                default=F("quantity")
   289	                - Coalesce(
   290	                    Subquery(allocations_subquery, output_field=models.IntegerField()),
   291	                    Value(0),
   292	                ),
   293	                output_field=models.IntegerField(),
   294	            ),
   295	        )

   316	    def visible_to_user(
   317	        self,
   318	        requestor: Union["User", "App", None],
   319	        channel: Channel | None,
   320	        limited_channel_access: bool,
   321	    ):
   322	        from .models import ALL_PRODUCTS_PERMISSIONS
   323	
   324	        # User with product permissions can see all variants. If channel is given,
   325	        # filter variants with product channel listings for this channel.
   326	        if has_one_of_permissions(requestor, ALL_PRODUCTS_PERMISSIONS):
   327	            if limited_channel_access:
   328	                if channel:
   329	                    return self.filter(product__channel_listings__channel_id=channel.id)
   330	                return self.none()
   331	            return self.all()
   332	
   333	        # If user has no permissions (customer) and channel is not given or is inactive,
   334	        # return no variants.
   335	        if not channel or not channel.is_active:
   336	            return self.none()
   337	
   338	        # If user has no permissions (customer) and channel is given, return variants
   339	        # that:
   340	        # - have a variant channel listing for this channel and the price is not null
   341	        # - have a product channel listing for this channel and the product is published
   342	        #  and visible in listings
   343	        variants = self.filter(
   344	            channel_listings__channel_id=channel.id,
   345	            channel_listings__price_amount__isnull=False,
   346	        )
   347	
   348	        today = datetime.datetime.now(tz=datetime.UTC)
   349	        variants = variants.filter(
   350	            Q(product__channel_listings__published_at__lte=today)
   351	            | Q(product__channel_listings__published_at__isnull=True),
   352	            product__channel_listings__is_published=True,
   353	            product__channel_listings__channel_id=channel.id,
   354	            product__channel_listings__visible_in_listings=True,
   355	        )
   356	        return variants

    16	def generate_and_set_variant_name(
    17	    variant: "ProductVariant", sku: str | None, save: bool | None = True
    18	):
    19	    """Generate ProductVariant's name based on its attributes."""
    20	    attributes_display = []
    21	
    22	    variant_selection_attributes = variant.attributes.filter(
    23	        assignment__variant_selection=True,
    24	        assignment__attribute__type=AttributeType.PRODUCT_TYPE,
    25	    )
    26	    attribute_rel: AssignedVariantAttribute
    27	    for attribute_rel in variant_selection_attributes.iterator(chunk_size=1000):
    28	        values_qs = attribute_rel.values.all()
    29	        attributes_display.append(", ".join([str(value) for value in values_qs]))
    30	
    31	    name = " / ".join(sorted(attributes_display))
    32	    if not name:
    33	        name = sku or variant.get_global_id()
    34	
    35	    variant.name = name
    36	    if save:
    37	        variant.save(update_fields=["name", "updated_at"])
    38	    return variant

    41	def get_variant_selection_attributes(
    42	    attributes: Iterable[tuple["Attribute", bool]],
    43	) -> list[tuple["Attribute", bool]]:
    44	    """Return attributes that can be used in variant selection.
    45	
    46	    Attribute must be product attribute and attribute input type must be
    47	    in ALLOWED_IN_VARIANT_SELECTION list.
    48	    """
    49	    return [
    50	        (attribute, variant_selection)
    51	        for attribute, variant_selection in attributes
    52	        if variant_selection and attribute.type == AttributeType.PRODUCT_TYPE
    53	    ]

    56	def fetch_variants_for_promotion_rules(rules: QuerySet[PromotionRule]):
    57	    from ...graphql.discount.utils import get_variants_for_catalogue_predicate
    58	
    59	    PromotionRuleVariant = PromotionRule.variants.through
    60	    new_rules_variants = []
    61	    for rule in rules.iterator(chunk_size=1000):
    62	        variants = get_variants_for_catalogue_predicate(
    63	            rule.catalogue_predicate,
    64	            database_connection_name=settings.DATABASE_CONNECTION_REPLICA_NAME,
    65	        )
    66	        new_rules_variants.extend(
    67	            [
    68	                PromotionRuleVariant(
    69	                    promotionrule_id=rule.pk, productvariant_id=variant_id
    70	                )
    71	                for variant_id in set(variants.values_list("pk", flat=True))
    72	            ]
    73	        )
    74	    return update_rule_variant_relation(rules, new_rules_variants)

    29	def update_discounted_prices_for_promotion(
    30	    products: ProductsQueryset, only_dirty_products: bool = False
    31	) -> list[VariantDiscountedPriceChange]:
    32	    """Update Products and ProductVariants discounted prices.
    33	
    34	    The discounted price is the minimal price of the product/variant based on active
    35	    promotions that are applied to a given product.
    36	    If there is no applied promotion rule, the discounted price for the product
    37	    is equal to the cheapest variant price, in the case of the variant it's equal
    38	    to the variant price.
    39	
    40	    When only_dirty_products set to True, the prices will be recalculated only for the
    41	    listings marked as dirty.
    42	
    43	    Returns a list of VariantDiscountedPriceChange for variants whose discounted price
    44	    changed.
    45	    """
    46	    variant_qs = ProductVariant.objects.using(
    47	        settings.DATABASE_CONNECTION_REPLICA_NAME
    48	    ).filter(Exists(products.filter(id=OuterRef("product_id"))))
    49	    rules_info_per_variant = get_variants_to_promotion_rules_map(variant_qs)
    50	    product_to_variant_listings_per_channel_map = (
    51	        _get_product_to_variant_channel_listings_per_channel_map(variant_qs)
    52	    )
    53	    variant_listing_to_listing_rule_per_rule_map = (
    54	        _get_variant_listings_to_listing_rule_per_rule_id_map(variant_qs)
    55	    )
    56	
    57	    changed_products_listings_to_update = []
    58	    changed_variants_listings_to_update = []
    59	
    60	    changed_variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create = []
    61	    changed_variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_update = []
    62	
    63	    changed_variant_prices: list[VariantDiscountedPriceChange] = []
    64	
    65	    product_channel_listings = (
    66	        ProductChannelListing.objects.using(settings.DATABASE_CONNECTION_REPLICA_NAME)
    67	        .filter(Exists(products.filter(id=OuterRef("product_id"))))
    68	        .prefetch_related("channel")
    69	    )
    70	    if only_dirty_products:
    71	        product_channel_listings.filter(discounted_price_dirty=True)
    72	
    73	    for product_channel_listing in product_channel_listings:
    74	        product_id = product_channel_listing.product_id
    75	        channel_id = product_channel_listing.channel_id
    76	        variant_listings = product_to_variant_listings_per_channel_map[product_id][
    77	            channel_id
    78	        ]
    79	        if not variant_listings:
    80	            continue
    81	        (
    82	            discounted_variants_price,
    83	            variant_listings_to_update,
    84	            variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create,
    85	            variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_update,
    86	            variant_price_changes,
    87	        ) = _get_discounted_variants_prices_for_promotions(
    88	            variant_listings,
    89	            rules_info_per_variant,
    90	            product_channel_listing.channel,
    91	            variant_listing_to_listing_rule_per_rule_map,
    92	        )
    93	
    94	        product_discounted_price = min(discounted_variants_price)
    95	        changed_variants_listings_to_update.extend(variant_listings_to_update)
    96	        changed_variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create.extend(
    97	            variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create
    98	        )
    99	        changed_variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_update.extend(
   100	            variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_update
   101	        )
   102	
   103	        changed_variant_prices.extend(variant_price_changes)
   104	
   105	        # check if the product discounted_price has changed
   106	        if product_channel_listing.discounted_price != product_discounted_price:
   107	            product_channel_listing.discounted_price_amount = (
   108	                product_discounted_price.amount
   109	            )
   110	            changed_products_listings_to_update.append(product_channel_listing)
   111	
   112	    _update_or_create_listings(
   113	        changed_products_listings_to_update,
   114	        changed_variants_listings_to_update,
   115	        changed_variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create,
   116	        changed_variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_update,
   117	    )
   118	
   119	    return changed_variant_prices

   122	def _update_or_create_listings(
   123	    changed_products_listings_to_update: list[ProductChannelListing],
   124	    changed_variants_listings_to_update: list[ProductVariantChannelListing],
   125	    changed_variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create: list[
   126	        VariantChannelListingPromotionRule
   127	    ],
   128	    changed_variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_update: list[
   129	        VariantChannelListingPromotionRule
   130	    ],
   131	):
   132	    if changed_products_listings_to_update:
   133	        ProductChannelListing.objects.bulk_update(
   134	            sorted(changed_products_listings_to_update, key=lambda listing: listing.id),
   135	            ["discounted_price_amount"],
   136	        )
   137	    if changed_variants_listings_to_update:
   138	        ProductVariantChannelListing.objects.bulk_update(
   139	            sorted(changed_variants_listings_to_update, key=lambda listing: listing.id),
   140	            ["discounted_price_amount"],

   142	    if changed_variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create:
   143	        _create_variant_listing_promotion_rule(
   144	            changed_variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create
   145	        )
   146	    if changed_variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_update:
   147	        VariantChannelListingPromotionRule.objects.bulk_update(
   148	            sorted(

   156	def _create_variant_listing_promotion_rule(variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create):
   157	    with transaction.atomic():
   158	        rule_ids = [
   159	            listing.promotion_rule_id
   160	            for listing in variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create
   161	        ]
   162	        listing_ids = [
   163	            listing.variant_channel_listing_id
   164	            for listing in variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create
   165	        ]
   166	        # Lock PromotionRule and ProductVariantChannelListing before bulk_create
   167	        rules = (
   168	            PromotionRule.objects.filter(id__in=rule_ids)
   169	            .select_for_update()
   170	            .order_by("pk")
   171	        )
   172	        variant_listings = (
   173	            ProductVariantChannelListing.objects.filter(id__in=listing_ids)
   174	            .select_for_update()
   175	            .order_by("pk")
   176	        )
   177	        # Do not create VariantChannelListingPromotionRule for rules that were deleted.
   178	        if len(rules) < len(rule_ids):
   179	            variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create = [
   180	                listing
   181	                for listing in variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create
   182	                if listing.promotion_rule_id in {rule.id for rule in rules}
   183	            ]
   184	        if len(variant_listings) < len(listing_ids):
   185	            variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create = [
   186	                listing
   187	                for listing in variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create
   188	                if listing.variant_channel_listing_id
   189	                in {listing.id for listing in variant_listings}
   190	            ]
   191	        # After migrating to Django 4.0 we should use `update_conflicts` instead
   192	        # of `ignore_conflicts`
   193	        # https://docs.djangoproject.com/en/4.1/ref/models/querysets/#bulk-create
   194	        VariantChannelListingPromotionRule.objects.bulk_create(
   195	            variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create, ignore_conflicts=True
   196	        )

   199	def _get_product_to_variant_channel_listings_per_channel_map(
   200	    variants: ProductVariantQueryset,
   201	):
   202	    variant_channel_listings = ProductVariantChannelListing.objects.filter(
   203	        Exists(variants.filter(id=OuterRef("variant_id"))), price_amount__isnull=False
   204	    )
   205	    variant_to_product_id = dict(
   206	        variants.values_list("id", "product_id").iterator(chunk_size=1000)
   207	    )
   208	
   209	    price_data: dict[int, dict[int, list[Money]]] = defaultdict(
   210	        lambda: defaultdict(list)
   211	    )
   212	    for variant_channel_listing in variant_channel_listings.iterator(chunk_size=1000):
   213	        try:
   214	            product_id = variant_to_product_id[variant_channel_listing.variant_id]
   215	        except KeyError:
   216	            continue
   217	        price_data[product_id][variant_channel_listing.channel_id].append(
   218	            variant_channel_listing
   219	        )
   220	    return price_data

    32	def _prep_product_search_vector_index(
    33	    products, page_id_to_title_map: dict[int, str] | None = None
    34	):
    35	    prefetch_related_objects(products, *PRODUCT_FIELDS_TO_PREFETCH)
    36	
    37	    for product in products:
    38	        product.search_vector = FlatConcatSearchVector(
    39	            *prepare_product_search_vector_value(
    40	                product,
    41	                already_prefetched=True,
    42	                page_id_to_title_map=page_id_to_title_map,
    43	            )
    44	        )
    45	        product.search_index_dirty = False
    46	
    47	    Product.objects.bulk_update(
    48	        products, ["search_vector", "updated_at", "search_index_dirty"]
    49	    )

    52	def update_products_search_vector(product_ids: Iterable[int]):
    53	    db_conn = settings.DATABASE_CONNECTION_REPLICA_NAME
    54	    product_ids = list(product_ids)
    55	    products = Product.objects.using(db_conn).filter(pk__in=product_ids).order_by("pk")
    56	    for product_pks in queryset_in_batches(products, PRODUCTS_BATCH_SIZE):
    57	        value_ids = (
    58	            AssignedProductAttributeValue.objects.using(db_conn)
    59	            .filter(product_id__in=product_pks)
    60	            .values_list("value_id", flat=True)
    61	        )
    62	        value_to_page_id = (
    63	            AttributeValue.objects.using(db_conn)
    64	            .filter(id__in=value_ids, reference_page_id__isnull=False)
    65	            .values_list("id", "reference_page_id")
    66	        )
    67	        page_id_to_title_map = dict(
    68	            Page.objects.using(db_conn)
    69	            .filter(id__in=[page_id for _, page_id in value_to_page_id])
    70	            .values_list("id", "title")
    71	        )
    72	
    73	        products_batch = list(Product.objects.using(db_conn).filter(id__in=product_pks))
    74	        _prep_product_search_vector_index(products_batch, page_id_to_title_map)

    77	def prepare_product_search_vector_value(
    78	    product: "Product",
    79	    *,
    80	    already_prefetched=False,
    81	    page_id_to_title_map: dict[int, str] | None = None,
    82	) -> list[NoValidationSearchVector]:
    83	    if not already_prefetched:
    84	        prefetch_related_objects([product], *PRODUCT_FIELDS_TO_PREFETCH)
    85	
    86	    search_vectors = [
    87	        NoValidationSearchVector(Value(product.name), config="simple", weight="A"),
    88	        NoValidationSearchVector(
    89	            Value(product.description_plaintext), config="simple", weight="C"
    90	        ),
    91	        *generate_attributes_search_vector_value(
    92	            product, page_id_to_title_map=page_id_to_title_map
    93	        ),
    94	        *generate_variants_search_vector_value(product),
    95	    ]
    96	    return search_vectors
    97	
    98	
    99	def generate_variants_search_vector_value(
   100	    product: "Product",
   101	) -> list[NoValidationSearchVector]:
   102	    variants = list(product.variants.all()[: settings.PRODUCT_MAX_INDEXED_VARIANTS])
   103	
   104	    search_vectors = [
   105	        NoValidationSearchVector(
   106	            Value(variant.sku), Value(variant.name), config="simple", weight="A"
   107	        )
   108	        if variant.sku
   109	        else NoValidationSearchVector(Value(variant.name), config="simple", weight="A")
   110	        for variant in variants
   111	        if variant.sku or variant.name
   112	    ]
   113	    if search_vectors:
   114	        for variant in variants:
   115	            search_vectors += generate_attributes_search_vector_value_with_assignment(
   116	                variant.attributes.all()[: settings.PRODUCT_MAX_INDEXED_ATTRIBUTES]
   117	            )
   118	    return search_vectors
   119	
   120	
   121	def generate_attributes_search_vector_value(
   122	    product: "Product",
   123	    *,
   124	    page_id_to_title_map: dict[int, str] | None = None,
   125	) -> list[NoValidationSearchVector]:
   126	    """Prepare `search_vector` value for assigned attributes.
   127	
   128	    Method should receive assigned attributes with prefetched `values`
   129	    """
   130	    product_attributes = product.product_type.attributeproduct.all()
   131	
   132	    attributes = [
   133	        product_attribute.attribute for product_attribute in product_attributes
   134	    ][: settings.PRODUCT_MAX_INDEXED_ATTRIBUTES]
   135	
   136	    assigned_values = product.attributevalues.all()
   137	
   138	    search_vectors = []
   139	
   140	    values_map = defaultdict(list)
   141	    for av in assigned_values:
   142	        values_map[av.value.attribute_id].append(av.value)
   143	
   144	    for attribute in attributes:
   145	        values = values_map[attribute.pk][
   146	            : settings.PRODUCT_MAX_INDEXED_ATTRIBUTE_VALUES
   147	        ]
   148	
   149	        search_vectors += get_search_vectors_for_attribute_values(
   150	            attribute, values, page_id_to_title_map=page_id_to_title_map, weight="B"
   151	        )
   152	    return search_vectors
   153	
   154	
   155	def generate_attributes_search_vector_value_with_assignment(
   156	    assigned_attributes: "QuerySet",
   157	) -> list[NoValidationSearchVector]:
   158	    """Prepare `search_vector` value for assigned attributes.
   159	
   160	    Method should receive assigned attributes with prefetched `values`
   161	    and `assignment__attribute`.
   162	    """
   163	    search_vectors = []
   164	    for assigned_attribute in assigned_attributes:
   165	        attribute = assigned_attribute.assignment.attribute
   166	        values = assigned_attribute.values.all()[
   167	            : settings.PRODUCT_MAX_INDEXED_ATTRIBUTE_VALUES
   168	        ]
   169	        search_vectors += get_search_vectors_for_attribute_values(
   170	            attribute, values, weight="B"
   171	        )
   172	    return search_vectors

   103	def check_stock_quantity(
   104	    variant: "ProductVariant",
   105	    country_code: str,
   106	    channel_slug: str,
   107	    quantity: int,
   108	    *,

   113	    database_connection_name: str = settings.DATABASE_CONNECTION_DEFAULT_NAME,
   114	):
   115	    """Validate if there is stock available for given variant in given channel.
   116	
   117	    If so - returns None. If there is less stock then required raise InsufficientStock
   118	    exception.
   119	    """
   120	    if variant.track_inventory:
   121	        stocks = Stock.objects.using(database_connection_name).get_variant_stocks(
   122	            channel_slug,

   124	            country_code=country_code,
   125	            include_shipping_zones=include_shipping_zones,
   126	        )
   127	        if not stocks:
   128	            raise InsufficientStock(

   132	                    )
   133	                ]
   134	            )
   135	
   136	        available_quantity = _get_available_quantity(

   149	def check_stock_and_preorder_quantity_bulk(
   150	    variants: Iterable["ProductVariant"],
   151	    country_code: str,
   152	    quantities: Iterable[int],
   153	    channel_slug: str,
   154	    global_quantity_limit: int | None,
   155	    *,
   156	    include_shipping_zones: bool,
   157	    delivery_method_info: Optional["DeliveryMethodBase"] = None,
   158	    additional_filter_lookup: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
   159	    existing_lines: list["CheckoutLineInfo"] | None = None,
   160	    replace: bool = False,
   161	    check_reservations: bool = False,
   162	):
   163	    """Validate if products are available for stocks/preorder.
   164	
   165	    :raises InsufficientStock: when there is not enough items in stock for a variant
   166	    or there is not enough available preorder items for a variant.
   167	    """
   168	    (
   169	        stock_variants,
   170	        stock_quantities,
   171	        preorder_variants,
   172	        preorder_quantities,
   173	    ) = _split_lines_for_trackable_and_preorder(variants, quantities)
   174	    if stock_variants:
   175	        check_stock_quantity_bulk(
   176	            stock_variants,
   177	            country_code,
   178	            stock_quantities,
   179	            channel_slug,
   180	            global_quantity_limit,
   181	            include_shipping_zones=include_shipping_zones,
   182	            delivery_method_info=delivery_method_info,
   183	            additional_filter_lookup=additional_filter_lookup,
   184	            existing_lines=existing_lines,
   185	            replace=replace,
   186	            check_reservations=check_reservations,
   187	        )
   188	    if preorder_variants:
   189	        check_preorder_threshold_bulk(
   190	            preorder_variants,
   191	            preorder_quantities,
   192	            channel_slug,
   193	            global_quantity_limit,
   194	            existing_lines,
   195	            replace,
   196	            check_reservations,
   197	        )

   200	def _split_lines_for_trackable_and_preorder(
   201	    variants: Iterable["ProductVariant"], quantities: Iterable[int]
   202	) -> tuple[
   203	    Iterable["ProductVariant"], Iterable[int], Iterable["ProductVariant"], Iterable[int]
   204	]:
   205	    """Return variants and quantities splitted by "is_preorder_active"."""
   206	    stock_variants, stock_quantities = [], []
   207	    preorder_variants, preorder_quantities = [], []
   208	
   209	    for variant, quantity in zip(variants, quantities, strict=False):
   210	        if variant.is_preorder_active():
   211	            preorder_variants.append(variant)
   212	            preorder_quantities.append(quantity)
   213	        else:
   214	            stock_variants.append(variant)
   215	            stock_quantities.append(quantity)
   216	    return (
   217	        stock_variants,
   218	        stock_quantities,
   219	        preorder_variants,
   220	        preorder_quantities,
   221	    )

   224	def _check_quantity_limits(

   226	) -> NoReturn | None:

   230	        raise ValidationError(

   234	                        f"Cannot add more than {quantity_limit} "
   235	                        f"times this item: {variant}."
   236	                    ),
   237	                    code=CheckoutErrorCode.QUANTITY_GREATER_THAN_LIMIT.value,
   238	                )

   241	    return None

   257	    database_connection_name: str = settings.DATABASE_CONNECTION_DEFAULT_NAME,
   258	):
   259	    """Validate if there is stock available for given variants in given country.
   260	
   261	    :raises InsufficientStock: when there is not enough items in stock for a variant.
   262	    """
   263	    filter_lookup = {"product_variant__in": variants}
   264	    if additional_filter_lookup is not None:
   265	        filter_lookup.update(additional_filter_lookup)
   266	
   267	    if include_shipping_zones:
   268	        # in case when the delivery method is not set yet, we should check the stock
   269	        # quantity in standard warehouses available in a given channel and country, and
   270	        # in the collection point warehouses for the channel
   271	        include_cc_warehouses = (
   272	            not delivery_method_info.delivery_method if delivery_method_info else True
   273	        )
   274	        # in case of click and collect order, we need to check local or global stock
   275	        # regardless of the country code
   276	        collection_point = (
   277	            delivery_method_info.warehouse_pk if delivery_method_info else None
   278	        )
   279	        stocks = (
   280	            Stock.objects.using(
   281	                database_connection_name
   282	            ).for_channel_and_click_and_collect(channel_slug)
   283	            if collection_point
   284	            else Stock.objects.using(database_connection_name).for_channel_or_country(
   285	                channel_slug,
   286	                country_code,
   287	                include_shipping_zones=True,
   288	                include_cc_warehouses=include_cc_warehouses,
   289	            )
   290	        )
   291	    else:
   292	        stocks = Stock.objects.using(database_connection_name).for_channel_or_country(
   293	            channel_slug,
   294	            include_shipping_zones=include_shipping_zones,
   295	        )
   296	
   297	    all_variants_stocks = stocks.filter(**filter_lookup).annotate_available_quantity()
   298	
   299	    variant_stocks: dict[int, list[Stock]] = defaultdict(list)
   300	    for stock in all_variants_stocks:
   301	        variant_stocks[stock.product_variant_id].append(stock)
   302	
   303	    if check_reservations:
   304	        variant_reservations = get_reserved_stock_quantity_bulk(
   305	            all_variants_stocks,
   306	            [line.line for line in existing_lines] if existing_lines else [],
   307	        )
   308	    else:
   309	        variant_reservations = defaultdict(int)
   310	
   311	    insufficient_stocks: list[InsufficientStockData] = []
   312	    variants_quantities = {
   313	        line.variant.pk: line.line.quantity for line in existing_lines or []
   314	    }
   315	    for variant, quantity in zip(variants, quantities, strict=False):
   316	        if not replace:
   317	            quantity += variants_quantities.get(variant.pk, 0)
   318	
   319	        stocks = variant_stocks.get(variant.pk, [])
   320	        available_quantity = sum([stock.available_quantity for stock in stocks])  # type: ignore[attr-defined]
   321	        available_quantity = max(
   322	            available_quantity - variant_reservations[variant.pk], 0
   323	        )
   324	
   325	        if quantity > 0:
   326	            _check_quantity_limits(variant, quantity, global_quantity_limit)
   327	
   328	            if not variant.track_inventory:
   329	                continue
   330	
   331	            if not stocks:
   332	                insufficient_stocks.append(
   333	                    InsufficientStockData(
   334	                        variant=variant, available_quantity=available_quantity
   335	                    )
   336	                )
   337	            elif quantity > available_quantity:
   338	                insufficient_stocks.append(
   339	                    InsufficientStockData(
   340	                        variant=variant,
   341	                        available_quantity=available_quantity,
   342	                    )
   343	                )
   344	
   345	    if insufficient_stocks:
   346	        raise InsufficientStock(insufficient_stocks)

   349	def _get_variants_channel_availability_info(
   350	    variants: Iterable["ProductVariant"],
   351	    channel_slug: str,
   352	    database_connection_name: str = settings.DATABASE_CONNECTION_DEFAULT_NAME,
   353	) -> VariantsChannelAvailbilityInfo:
   354	    all_variants_channel_listings = (
   355	        ProductVariantChannelListing.objects.using(database_connection_name)
   356	        .filter(variant__in=variants)
   357	        .annotate_preorder_quantity_allocated()
   358	        .annotate(
   359	            available_preorder_quantity=F("preorder_quantity_threshold")
   360	            - Coalesce(Sum("preorder_allocations__quantity"), 0),
   361	        )
   362	        .select_related("channel")
   363	    )
   364	    variants_channel_availability = {
   365	        channel_listing.variant_id: ChannelListingPreorderAvailbilityInfo(
   366	            channel_listing.available_preorder_quantity,
   367	            channel_listing.preorder_quantity_threshold,
   368	            channel_listing.id,
   369	        )
   370	        for channel_listing in all_variants_channel_listings
   371	        if channel_listing.channel.slug == channel_slug
   372	    }
   373	
   374	    variant_channels: dict[int, list[ProductVariantChannelListing]] = defaultdict(list)
   375	    for channel_listing in all_variants_channel_listings:
   376	        variant_channels[channel_listing.variant_id].append(channel_listing)
   377	
   378	    variants_global_allocations = {
   379	        variant_id: sum(
   380	            channel_listing.preorder_quantity_allocated  # type: ignore[attr-defined]
   381	            for channel_listing in channel_listings
   382	        )
   383	        for variant_id, channel_listings in variant_channels.items()
   384	    }
   385	    return VariantsChannelAvailbilityInfo(
   386	        variants_channel_availability,
   387	        variants_global_allocations,
   388	        all_variants_channel_listings,
   389	        variant_channels,
   390	    )

   393	def check_preorder_threshold_in_orders(
   394	    variant: "ProductVariant",
   395	    quantity: int,
   396	    channel_slug: str,
   397	    checkout_lines: Iterable["CheckoutLine"] | None,
   398	    check_reservations: bool,
   399	    database_connection_name: str = settings.DATABASE_CONNECTION_DEFAULT_NAME,
   400	):
   401	    """Validate if there is preorder available for given variants in given country.
   402	
   403	    It is used in orders, since it does not need additional logic related to limits.
   404	    :raises InsufficientStock: when there is not enough items in stock for a variant.
   405	    """
   406	    (
   407	        variants_channel_availability,
   408	        variants_global_allocations,
   409	        all_variants_channel_listings,
   410	        variant_channels,
   411	    ) = _get_variants_channel_availability_info(
   412	        [variant], channel_slug, database_connection_name=database_connection_name
   413	    )
   414	
   415	    if check_reservations:
   416	        listings_reservations = get_listings_reservations(
   417	            checkout_lines,
   418	            all_variants_channel_listings,
   419	            database_connection_name=database_connection_name,
   420	        )
   421	    else:
   422	        listings_reservations = defaultdict(int)
   423	
   424	    insufficient_stocks: list[InsufficientStockData] = []
   425	
   426	    if (
   427	        variants_channel_availability[variant.id].preorder_quantity_threshold
   428	        is not None
   429	    ):
   430	        channel_listing_id = variants_channel_availability[variant.id].listing_id
   431	        available_channel_quantity = variants_channel_availability[
   432	            variant.id
   433	        ].preorder_quantity
   434	        available_channel_quantity -= listings_reservations[channel_listing_id]
   435	        available_channel_quantity = max(available_channel_quantity, 0)
   436	
   437	        if quantity > available_channel_quantity:
   438	            insufficient_stocks.append(
   439	                InsufficientStockData(
   440	                    variant=variant, available_quantity=available_channel_quantity
   441	                )
   442	            )
   443	
   444	        if variant.preorder_global_threshold is not None:
   445	            global_availability = variant.preorder_global_threshold
   446	            global_availability -= variants_global_allocations[variant.id]
   447	
   448	            for channel_listing in variant_channels[variant.id]:
   449	                global_availability -= listings_reservations[channel_listing.id]
   450	
   451	            global_availability = max(global_availability, 0)
   452	
   453	            if quantity > global_availability:
   454	                insufficient_stocks.append(
   455	                    InsufficientStockData(
   456	                        variant=variant,
   457	                        available_quantity=global_availability,
   458	                    )
   459	                )
   460	
   461	    if insufficient_stocks:
   462	        raise InsufficientStock(insufficient_stocks)
   463

   465	def check_preorder_threshold_bulk(
   466	    variants: Iterable["ProductVariant"],
   467	    quantities: Iterable[int],
   468	    channel_slug: str,
   469	    global_quantity_limit: int | None,
   470	    existing_lines: list["CheckoutLineInfo"] | None = None,
   471	    replace: bool = False,
   472	    check_reservations: bool = False,
   473	):
   474	    """Validate if there is enough preordered variants according to thresholds.
   475	
   476	    :raises InsufficientStock: when there is not enough available items for a variant.
   477	    """
   478	    (
   479	        variants_channel_availability,
   480	        variants_global_allocations,
   481	        all_variants_channel_listings,
   482	        variant_channels,
   483	    ) = _get_variants_channel_availability_info(variants, channel_slug)
   484	
   485	    if check_reservations:
   486	        listings_reservations = get_listings_reservations(
   487	            [line.line for line in existing_lines or []], all_variants_channel_listings
   488	        )
   489	    else:
   490	        listings_reservations = defaultdict(int)
   491	
   492	    insufficient_stocks: list[InsufficientStockData] = []
   493	    variants_quantities = {
   494	        line.variant.pk: line.line.quantity for line in existing_lines or []
   495	    }
   496	    for variant, quantity in zip(variants, quantities, strict=False):
   497	        cumulative_quantity = quantity
   498	        if not replace:
   499	            cumulative_quantity = quantity + variants_quantities.get(variant.pk, 0)
   500	
   501	        if quantity > 0:
   502	            _check_quantity_limits(variant, cumulative_quantity, global_quantity_limit)
   503	
   504	        if (
   505	            variants_channel_availability[variant.id].preorder_quantity_threshold
   506	            is not None
   507	        ):
   508	            channel_listing_id = variants_channel_availability[variant.id].listing_id
   509	            available_channel_quantity = variants_channel_availability[
   510	                variant.id
   511	            ].preorder_quantity
   512	            available_channel_quantity -= listings_reservations[channel_listing_id]
   513	            available_channel_quantity = max(available_channel_quantity, 0)
   514	            if quantity > available_channel_quantity:
   515	                insufficient_stocks.append(
   516	                    InsufficientStockData(
   517	                        variant=variant,
   518	                        available_quantity=available_channel_quantity,
   519	                    )
   520	                )
   521	
   522	        if variant.preorder_global_threshold is not None:
   523	            global_availability = variant.preorder_global_threshold
   524	            global_availability -= variants_global_allocations[variant.id]
   525	
   526	            for channel_listing in variant_channels[variant.id]:
   527	                global_availability -= listings_reservations[channel_listing.id]
   528	
   529	            global_availability = max(global_availability, 0)
   530	
   531	            if quantity > global_availability:
   532	                insufficient_stocks.append(
   533	                    InsufficientStockData(
   534	                        variant=variant,
   535	                        available_quantity=global_availability,
   536	                    )
   537	                )
   538	
   539	    if insufficient_stocks:
   540	        raise InsufficientStock(insufficient_stocks)

   543	def get_available_quantity(
   544	    variant: "ProductVariant",
   545	    country_code: str,
   546	    channel_slug: str,
   547	    *,
   548	    calculate_stocks_with_shipping_zones: bool,
   549	    checkout_lines: list["CheckoutLine"] | None = None,
   550	    check_reservations: bool = False,
   551	) -> int:
   552	    """Return available quantity for given product in given channel."""
   553	    stocks = Stock.objects.get_variant_stocks(
   554	        channel_slug,
   555	        variant,
   556	        country_code=country_code,
   557	        include_shipping_zones=calculate_stocks_with_shipping_zones,
   558	    )
   559	    if not stocks:
   560	        return 0
    30	    checkout_lines: Iterable["CheckoutLine"],
    31	    lines_to_update_reservation_time: Iterable["CheckoutLine"],
    32	    variants: Iterable["ProductVariant"],
    33	    country_code: str,
    34	    channel: "Channel",
    35	    length_in_minutes: int,
    36	    *,
    37	    calculate_stocks_with_shipping_zones: bool,
    38	    replace: bool = True,
    39	):
    40	    stock_variants, stock_lines = [], []
    41	    preorder_variants, preorder_lines = [], []
    42	
    43	    for variant in variants:
    44	        if variant.is_preorder_active():
    45	            preorder_variants.append(variant)
    46	        else:
    47	            stock_variants.append(variant)
    48	
    49	    for line in checkout_lines:
    50	        if line.variant.is_preorder_active():
    51	            preorder_lines.append(line)
    52	        else:
    53	            stock_lines.append(line)
    54	
    55	    reserved_until = timezone.now() + datetime.timedelta(minutes=length_in_minutes)
    56	
    57	    if stock_lines:
    58	        reserve_stocks(
    59	            stock_lines,
    60	            stock_variants,
    61	            country_code,
    62	            channel,
    63	            reserved_until,
    64	            replace=replace,
    65	            calculate_stocks_with_shipping_zones=calculate_stocks_with_shipping_zones,
    66	        )
    67	
    68	        # Refresh reserved_until for already existing lines
    69	        if lines_to_update_reservation_time:
    70	            Reservation.objects.filter(
    71	                checkout_line__in=lines_to_update_reservation_time
    72	            ).update(reserved_until=reserved_until)
    73	
    74	    if preorder_lines:
    75	        reserve_preorders(
    76	            preorder_lines,
    77	            preorder_variants,
    78	            country_code,
    79	            channel.slug,
    80	            reserved_until,
    81	            replace=replace,
    82	        )
    83	
    84	        # Refresh reserved_until for already existing lines
    85	        if lines_to_update_reservation_time:
    86	            PreorderReservation.objects.filter(
    87	                checkout_line__in=lines_to_update_reservation_time
    88	            ).update(reserved_until=reserved_until)

    91	def reserve_stocks(
    92	    checkout_lines: Iterable["CheckoutLine"],
    93	    variants: Iterable["ProductVariant"],
    94	    country_code: str,
    95	    channel: "Channel",
    96	    reserved_until: datetime.datetime,
    97	    *,
    98	    replace: bool = True,
    99	    calculate_stocks_with_shipping_zones: bool,
   100	):
   101	    """Reserve stocks for given `checkout_lines` in given country."""
   102	    variants_ids = [line.variant_id for line in checkout_lines]
   103	    variants = [variant for variant in variants if variant.pk in variants_ids]
   104	    variants_map = {variant.id: variant for variant in variants}
   105	
   106	    # Reservation is only applied to checkout lines with variants with track inventory
   107	    # set to True
   108	    checkout_lines = get_checkout_lines_to_reserve(checkout_lines, variants_map)
   109	    if not checkout_lines:
   110	        return
   111	
   112	    stocks = list(
   113	        stock_qs_select_for_update()
   114	        .get_variants_stocks(
   115	            channel.slug,
   116	            variants,
   117	            country_code=country_code,
   118	            include_shipping_zones=calculate_stocks_with_shipping_zones,
   119	        )
   120	        .order_by("pk")
   121	        .values("id", "product_variant", "pk", "quantity", "warehouse_id")
   122	    )
   123	    stocks_id = [stock.pop("id") for stock in stocks]
   124	
   125	    quantity_allocation_list = list(
   126	        Allocation.objects.filter(
   127	            stock_id__in=stocks_id,
   128	            quantity_allocated__gt=0,
   129	        )
   130	        .values("stock")
   131	        .annotate(quantity_allocated_sum=Sum("quantity_allocated"))
   132	    )
   133	    quantity_allocation_for_stocks: dict = defaultdict(int)
   134	    for allocation in quantity_allocation_list:
   135	        quantity_allocation_for_stocks[allocation["stock"]] += allocation[
   136	            "quantity_allocated_sum"
   137	        ]
   138	
   139	    quantity_reservation_list = list(
   140	        Reservation.objects.filter(
   141	            stock_id__in=stocks_id,
   142	            quantity_reserved__gt=0,
   143	        )
   144	        .not_expired()
   145	        .exclude_checkout_lines(checkout_lines)
   146	        .values("stock")
   147	        .annotate(quantity_reserved_sum=Sum("quantity_reserved"))
   148	    )
   149	    quantity_reservation_for_stocks: dict = defaultdict(int)
   150	    for reservation in quantity_reservation_list:
   151	        quantity_reservation_for_stocks[reservation["stock"]] += reservation[
   152	            "quantity_reserved_sum"
   153	        ]
   154	
   155	    stocks = sort_stocks(
   156	        channel.allocation_strategy,
   157	        stocks,
   158	        channel,
   159	        quantity_allocation_for_stocks,
   160	    )
   161	
   162	    variant_to_stocks: dict[int, list[StockData]] = defaultdict(list)
   163	    for stock_data in stocks:
   164	        variant = stock_data.pop("product_variant")
   165	        variant_to_stocks[variant].append(StockData(**stock_data))
   166	
   167	    insufficient_stocks: list[InsufficientStockData] = []
   168	    reservations: list[Reservation] = []
   169	    for line in checkout_lines:
   170	        stock_reservations = variant_to_stocks[line.variant_id]
   171	        insufficient_stocks, reserved_items = _create_stock_reservations(
   172	            line,
   173	            variants_map[line.variant_id],
   174	            stock_reservations,
   175	            quantity_allocation_for_stocks,
   176	            quantity_reservation_for_stocks,
   177	            insufficient_stocks,
   178	            reserved_until,
   179	        )
   180	        reservations.extend(reserved_items)
   181	
   182	    if insufficient_stocks:
   183	        raise InsufficientStock(insufficient_stocks)
   184	
   185	    if reservations:
   186	        if replace:
   187	            Reservation.objects.filter(checkout_line__in=checkout_lines).delete()
   188	        Reservation.objects.bulk_create(reservations)
   189	
   190	
   191	def _create_stock_reservations(
   192	    line: "CheckoutLine",
   193	    variant: "ProductVariant",
   194	    stocks: list[StockData],
   195	    quantity_allocation_for_stocks: dict,
   196	    quantity_reservation_for_stocks: dict,
   197	    insufficient_stocks: list[InsufficientStockData],
   198	    reserved_until: datetime.datetime,
   199	) -> tuple[list[InsufficientStockData], list[Reservation]]:
   200	    quantity = line.quantity
   201	    quantity_reserved = 0
   202	    reservations = []
   203	    for stock_data in stocks:
   204	        quantity_allocated_in_stock = quantity_allocation_for_stocks.get(
   205	            stock_data.pk, 0
   206	        )
   207	        quantity_reserved_in_stock = quantity_reservation_for_stocks.get(
   208	            stock_data.pk, 0
   209	        )
   210	
   211	        quantity_available_in_stock = max(
   212	            stock_data.quantity
   213	            - quantity_allocated_in_stock
   214	            - quantity_reserved_in_stock,
   215	            0,
   216	        )
   217	
   218	        quantity_to_reserve = min(
   219	            (quantity - quantity_reserved), quantity_available_in_stock
   220	        )
   221	        if quantity_to_reserve > 0:
   222	            reservations.append(
   223	                Reservation(
   224	                    checkout_line=line,
   225	                    stock_id=stock_data.pk,
   226	                    quantity_reserved=quantity_to_reserve,
   227	                    reserved_until=reserved_until,
   228	                )
   229	            )
   230	
   231	            quantity_reserved += quantity_to_reserve
   232	            if quantity_reserved == quantity:
   233	                return insufficient_stocks, reservations
   234	
   235	    if quantity_reserved != quantity:
   236	        insufficient_stocks.append(
   237	            InsufficientStockData(
   238	                variant=variant,
   239	                available_quantity=quantity,
   240	            )
   241	        )
   242	        return insufficient_stocks, []
   243	
   244	    return [], []
   245	
   246	
   247	def reserve_preorders(
   248	    checkout_lines: Iterable["CheckoutLine"],
   249	    variants: Iterable["ProductVariant"],
   250	    country_code: str,
   251	    channel_slug: str,
   252	    reserved_until: datetime.datetime,
   253	    *,
   254	    replace: bool = True,
   255	):
   256	    """Reserve preorders for given `checkout_lines` in given country."""
   257	    variants_ids = [line.variant_id for line in checkout_lines]
   258	    variants = [variant for variant in variants if variant.pk in variants_ids]
   259	    variants_map = {variant.id: variant for variant in variants}
   260	
   261	    all_variants_channel_listings = (
   262	        ProductVariantChannelListing.objects.filter(variant__in=variants)
   263	        .annotate_preorder_quantity_allocated()
   264	        .annotate(
   265	            available_preorder_quantity=F("preorder_quantity_threshold")
   266	            - Coalesce(Sum("preorder_allocations__quantity"), 0),
   267	        )
   268	        .select_related("channel")
   269	    )
   270	    variants_channel_listings = {
   271	        channel_listing.variant_id: channel_listing
   272	        for channel_listing in all_variants_channel_listings
   273	        if channel_listing.channel.slug == channel_slug
   274	    }
   275	
   276	    checkout_lines_to_reserve = []
   277	    for line in checkout_lines:
   278	        line_variant_channel_listing = variants_channel_listings[line.variant_id]
   279	        if (
   280	            line.variant.preorder_global_threshold
   281	            or line_variant_channel_listing.preorder_quantity_threshold is not None
   282	        ):
   283	            checkout_lines_to_reserve.append(line)
   284	
   285	    if not checkout_lines_to_reserve:
   286	        return
   287	
   288	    variant_channels: dict[int, list[ProductVariantChannelListing]] = defaultdict(list)
   289	    for channel_listing in all_variants_channel_listings:
   290	        variant_channels[channel_listing.variant_id].append(channel_listing)
   291	
   292	    variants_global_allocations = {
   293	        variant_id: sum(
   294	            channel_listing.preorder_quantity_allocated  # type: ignore[attr-defined]
   295	            for channel_listing in channel_listings
   296	        )
   297	        for variant_id, channel_listings in variant_channels.items()
   298	    }
   299	
   300	    listings_reservations: dict = get_listings_reservations(
   301	        checkout_lines, all_variants_channel_listings
   302	    )
   303	
   304	    insufficient_stocks: list[InsufficientStockData] = []
   305	    reservations: list[PreorderReservation] = []
   306	    for line in checkout_lines_to_reserve:
   307	        insufficient_stocks, reservation = _create_preorder_reservation(
   308	            line,
   309	            variants_map[line.variant_id],
   310	            variants_channel_listings[line.variant_id],
   311	            variant_channels[line.variant_id],
   312	            variants_global_allocations[line.variant_id],
   313	            listings_reservations,
   314	            insufficient_stocks,
   315	            reserved_until,
   316	        )
   317	        if reservation:
   318	            reservations.append(reservation)
   319	
   320	    if insufficient_stocks:
   321	        raise InsufficientStock(insufficient_stocks)
   322	
   323	    if reservation:
   324	        if replace:
   325	            PreorderReservation.objects.filter(
   326	                checkout_line__in=checkout_lines_to_reserve
   327	            ).delete()
   328	        PreorderReservation.objects.bulk_create(reservations)

   330	
   331	def _create_preorder_reservation(
   332	    line: "CheckoutLine",
   333	    variant: "ProductVariant",
   334	    listing: "ProductVariantChannelListing",
   335	    all_listings: list["ProductVariantChannelListing"],
   336	    global_allocations: int,
   337	    listings_reservations: dict[int, int],
   338	    insufficient_stocks: list[InsufficientStockData],
   339	    reserved_until: datetime.datetime,
   340	):
   341	    if listing.preorder_quantity_threshold is not None:
   342	        available_channel_quantity = listing.available_preorder_quantity  # type: ignore[attr-defined]
   343	        available_channel_quantity = max(
   344	            available_channel_quantity - listings_reservations[listing.id], 0
   345	        )
   346	        if line.quantity > available_channel_quantity:
   347	            insufficient_stocks.append(
   348	                InsufficientStockData(
   349	                    variant=variant,
   350	                    available_quantity=available_channel_quantity,
   351	                )
   352	            )
   353	
   354	    if variant.preorder_global_threshold:
   355	        # check global reservations
   356	        available_global_quantity = variant.preorder_global_threshold
   357	        available_global_quantity -= global_allocations
   358	        global_reservations = 0
   359	        for channel_listing in all_listings:
   360	            global_reservations += listings_reservations[channel_listing.id]
   361	
   362	        available_global_quantity -= global_reservations
   363	        available_global_quantity = max(available_global_quantity, 0)
   364	
   365	        if line.quantity > available_global_quantity:
   366	            insufficient_stocks.append(
   367	                InsufficientStockData(
   368	                    variant=variant,
   369	                    available_quantity=available_global_quantity,
   370	                )
   371	            )
   372	
   373	    if listing.preorder_quantity_threshold or variant.preorder_global_threshold:
   374	        # create reservation
   375	        return insufficient_stocks, PreorderReservation(
   376	            checkout_line=line,
   377	            product_variant_channel_listing=listing,
   378	            quantity_reserved=line.quantity,
   379	            reserved_until=reserved_until,
   380	        )
   381	
   382	    return insufficient_stocks, None
   383

   385	def get_checkout_lines_to_reserve(
   386	    lines: Iterable["CheckoutLine"],
   387	    variants_map: dict[int, "ProductVariant"],
   388	) -> Iterable["CheckoutLine"]:
   389	    """Return checkout lines which can be reserved."""
   390	    valid_lines = []
   391	    for line in lines:
   392	        if (
   393	            line.quantity
   394	            and line.variant_id
   395	            and variants_map[line.variant_id].track_inventory
   396	        ):
   397	            valid_lines.append(line)
   398	    return valid_lines
