   414	def get_listings_reservations(
   415	    checkout_lines: Iterable["CheckoutLine"] | None,
   416	    all_variants_channel_listings,
   417	    database_connection_name: str = settings.DATABASE_CONNECTION_DEFAULT_NAME,
   418	) -> dict[int, int]:
   419	    quantity_reservation_list = (
   420	        PreorderReservation.objects.using(database_connection_name)
   421	        .filter(
   422	            product_variant_channel_listing__in=all_variants_channel_listings,
   423	            quantity_reserved__gt=0,
   424	        )
   425	        .not_expired()
   426	        .exclude_checkout_lines(checkout_lines)
   427	        .values("product_variant_channel_listing")
   428	        .annotate(quantity_reserved_sum=Sum("quantity_reserved"))
   429	    )
   430	    listings_reservations: dict = defaultdict(int)
   431	
   432	    for reservation in quantity_reservation_list:
   433	        listings_reservations[reservation["product_variant_channel_listing"]] += (
   434	            reservation["quantity_reserved_sum"]
   435	        )
   436	
   437	    return listings_reservations
   120	    # allocation only applied to order lines with variants with track inventory
   121	    # set to True
   122	    order_lines_info = get_order_lines_with_track_inventory(order_lines_info)
   123	    if not order_lines_info:
   124	        return
   125	
   126	    channel_slug = channel.slug
   127	
   128	    variants = [line_info.variant for line_info in order_lines_info]
   129	    filter_lookup = {"product_variant__in": variants}
   130	
   131	    if additional_filter_lookup is not None:
   132	        filter_lookup.update(additional_filter_lookup)
   133	
   134	    # in case of click and collect order, we need to check local or global stock
   135	    # regardless of the country code
   136	    if collection_point_pk:
   137	        stocks = Stock.objects.for_channel_and_click_and_collect(channel_slug)
   138	    else:
   139	        stocks = Stock.objects.for_channel_or_country(
   140	            channel_slug,
   141	            country_code,
   142	            include_shipping_zones=calculate_stocks_with_shipping_zones,
   143	        )
   144	
   145	    stocks = list(
   146	        stock_select_for_update_for_existing_qs(stocks)
   147	        .filter(**filter_lookup)
   148	        .values("id", "product_variant", "pk", "quantity", "warehouse_id")
   149	    )
   150	    stocks_id = (stock.pop("id") for stock in stocks)
   151	
   152	    quantity_reservation_for_stocks: dict = _prepare_stock_to_reserved_quantity_map(
   153	        checkout_lines, check_reservations, stocks_id
   154	    )
   155	
   156	    quantity_allocation_list = list(
   157	        Allocation.objects.filter(
   158	            stock_id__in=stocks_id,
   159	            quantity_allocated__gt=0,
   160	        )
   161	        .values("stock")
   162	        .annotate(quantity_allocated_sum=Sum("quantity_allocated"))
   163	    )
   164	    quantity_allocation_for_stocks: dict = defaultdict(int)
   165	    for allocation_data in quantity_allocation_list:
   166	        quantity_allocation_for_stocks[allocation_data["stock"]] += allocation_data[
   167	            "quantity_allocated_sum"
   168	        ]
   169	
   170	    stocks = sort_stocks(
   171	        channel.allocation_strategy,
   172	        stocks,
   173	        channel,
   174	        quantity_allocation_for_stocks,
   175	        collection_point_pk,
   176	    )
   177	
   178	    variant_to_stocks: dict[int, list[StockData]] = defaultdict(list)
   179	    for stock_data in stocks:
   180	        variant = stock_data.pop("product_variant")
   181	        variant_to_stocks[variant].append(StockData(**stock_data))
   182	
   183	    insufficient_stock: list[InsufficientStockData] = []
   184	    allocations: list[Allocation] = []
   185	    for line_info in order_lines_info:
   186	        line_info.variant = cast(ProductVariant, line_info.variant)
   187	        stock_allocations = variant_to_stocks[line_info.variant.pk]
   188	        insufficient_stock, allocation_items = _create_allocations(
   189	            line_info,
   190	            stock_allocations,
   191	            quantity_allocation_for_stocks,
   192	            quantity_reservation_for_stocks,
   193	            insufficient_stock,
   194	        )
   195	        allocations.extend(allocation_items)
   196	
   197	    if insufficient_stock:
   198	        raise InsufficientStock(insufficient_stock)
   199	
   200	    if allocations:
   201	        Allocation.objects.bulk_create(allocations)
   202	
   203	        stocks_to_update_map = {alloc.stock_id: alloc.stock for alloc in allocations}
   204	        quantity_from_allocations: dict[int, int] = defaultdict(int)
   205	
   206	        for alloc in allocations:
   207	            quantity_from_allocations[alloc.stock_id] += alloc.quantity_allocated
   208	
   209	        for stock_id, quantity in quantity_from_allocations.items():
   210	            stock = stocks_to_update_map[stock_id]
   211	            stock.quantity_allocated = F("quantity_allocated") + quantity
   212	
   213	        Stock.objects.bulk_update(stocks_to_update_map.values(), ["quantity_allocated"])
   214	
   215	        legacy_stock_availability = (
   216	            site_settings.use_legacy_shipping_zone_stock_availability
   217	        )
   218	        out_of_stock_stocks: list[Stock] = []
   219	        for allocation in allocations:
   220	            allocated_stock = (
   221	                Allocation.objects.filter(stock_id=allocation.stock_id).aggregate(
   222	                    Sum("quantity_allocated")
   223	                )["quantity_allocated__sum"]
   224	                or 0
   225	            )
   226	            if not max(allocation.stock.quantity - allocated_stock, 0):
   227	                transaction.on_commit(
   228	                    lambda: trigger_product_variant_out_of_stock(
   229	                        allocation.stock, requestor=requestor
   230	                    )
   231	                )
   232	                out_of_stock_stocks.append(allocation.stock)
   233	        if out_of_stock_stocks and not legacy_stock_availability:
   234	            transaction.on_commit(
   235	                partial(
   236	                    trigger_out_of_stock_in_channel_events_for_stocks,
   237	                    out_of_stock_stocks,
   238	                    site_settings,
   239	                )
   240	            )
   241	
   242	
   243	def _prepare_stock_to_reserved_quantity_map(
   244	    checkout_lines, check_reservations, stocks_id
   245	):
   246	    """Prepare stock id to quantity reserved map for provided stock ids."""
   247	    quantity_reservation_for_stocks: dict = defaultdict(int)
   248	
   249	    if check_reservations:
   250	        quantity_reservation = (
   251	            Reservation.objects.filter(
   252	                stock_id__in=stocks_id,
   253	            )
   254	            .not_expired()
   255	            .exclude_checkout_lines(checkout_lines or [])
   256	            .values("stock")
   257	            .annotate(
   258	                quantity_reserved=Coalesce(Sum("quantity_reserved"), 0),
   259	            )
   260	        )
   261	        for reservation in quantity_reservation:
   262	            quantity_reservation_for_stocks[reservation["stock"]] += reservation[
   263	                "quantity_reserved"
   264	            ]
   265	    return quantity_reservation_for_stocks
   266	
   267	
   268	def sort_stocks(
   269	    allocation_strategy: str,
   270	    stocks: list[dict],
   271	    channel: "Channel",
   272	    quantity_allocation_for_stocks: dict[int, int],
   273	    collection_point_pk: UUID | None = None,
   274	):
   275	    warehouse_ids = [stock_data["warehouse_id"] for stock_data in stocks]
   276	    channel_warehouse_ids = ChannelWarehouse.objects.filter(
   277	        channel_id=channel.id, warehouse_id__in=warehouse_ids
   278	    ).values_list("warehouse_id", flat=True)
   279	
   280	    def sort_stocks_by_highest_stocks(stock_data):
   281	        """Sort the stocks by the highest quantity available."""
   282	        # in case of click and collect order we should allocate stocks from
   283	        # collection point warehouse at the first place
   284	        if stock_data.pop("warehouse_id") == collection_point_pk:
   285	            return math.inf
   286	        return stock_data["quantity"] - quantity_allocation_for_stocks.get(
   287	            stock_data["pk"], 0
   288	        )
   289	
   290	    def sort_stocks_by_warehouse_sorting_order(stock_data):
   291	        """Sort the stocks based on the warehouse within channel order."""
   292	        # get the sort order for stocks warehouses within the channel
   293	        sorted_warehouse_list = list(channel_warehouse_ids)
   294	
   295	        warehouse_id = stock_data.pop("warehouse_id")
   296	        # in case of click and collect order we should allocate stocks from
   297	        # collection point warehouse at the first place
   298	        if warehouse_id == collection_point_pk:
   299	            return -math.inf
   300	        return sorted_warehouse_list.index(warehouse_id)
   301	
   302	    allocation_strategy_to_sort_method_and_reverse_option = {
   303	        AllocationStrategy.PRIORITIZE_HIGH_STOCK: (sort_stocks_by_highest_stocks, True),
   304	        AllocationStrategy.PRIORITIZE_SORTING_ORDER: (
   305	            sort_stocks_by_warehouse_sorting_order,
   306	            False,
   307	        ),
   308	    }
   309	    sort_method, reverse = allocation_strategy_to_sort_method_and_reverse_option[
   310	        allocation_strategy
   311	    ]
   312	    stocks.sort(key=sort_method, reverse=reverse)
   313	    return stocks
   314	
   315	
   316	def _create_allocations(
   317	    line_info: "OrderLineInfo",
   318	    stocks: list[StockData],
   319	    stocks_allocations: dict,
   320	    stocks_reservations: dict,
   321	    insufficient_stock: list[InsufficientStockData],
   322	) -> tuple[list[InsufficientStockData], list[Any]]:
   323	    quantity = line_info.quantity
   324	    quantity_allocated = 0
   325	    allocations = []
   326	    for stock_data in stocks:
   327	        quantity_available_in_stock = stock_data.quantity
   328	        quantity_available_in_stock -= stocks_allocations.get(stock_data.pk, 0)
   329	        quantity_available_in_stock -= stocks_reservations.get(stock_data.pk, 0)
   330	
   331	        quantity_to_allocate = min(
   332	            (quantity - quantity_allocated), quantity_available_in_stock
   333	        )
   334	        if quantity_to_allocate > 0:
   335	            allocations.append(
   336	                Allocation(
   337	                    order_line=line_info.line,
   338	                    stock_id=stock_data.pk,
   339	                    quantity_allocated=quantity_to_allocate,
   340	                )
   341	            )
   342	
   343	            quantity_allocated += quantity_to_allocate
   344	            if quantity_allocated == quantity:
   345	                return insufficient_stock, allocations
   346	
   347	    if not quantity_allocated == quantity:
   348	        insufficient_stock.append(
   349	            InsufficientStockData(
   350	                variant=line_info.variant,
   351	                order_line=line_info.line,
   352	                available_quantity=0,
   353	            )
   354	        )
   355	        return insufficient_stock, []
   356	    return [], allocations
   357	
   358	
   359	def deallocate_stock(
   360	    order_lines_data: list["OrderLineInfo"],
   361	    site_settings: "SiteSettings",
   362	    requestor: T_REQUESTOR,
   363	):
   364	    """Deallocate stocks for given `order_lines`.
   365	
   366	    Function lock for update stocks and allocations related to given `order_lines`.
   367	    Iterate over allocations sorted by `stock.pk` and deallocate as many items
   368	    as needed of available in stock for order line, until deallocated all required
   369	    quantity for the order line. If there is less quantity in stocks then
   370	    raise an exception.
   371	    """
   372	    # local import: to be removed when all webhook logic will be moved outside plugin
   373	    from .channel_stock_availability import (
   374	        trigger_back_in_stock_in_channel_events_for_stocks,
   375	    )
   376	
   377	    lines = [line_info.line for line_info in order_lines_data]
   378	    lines_allocations = allocation_with_stock_qs_select_for_update().filter(
   379	        order_line__in=lines
   380	    )
   381	
   382	    line_to_allocations: dict[UUID, list[Allocation]] = defaultdict(list)
   383	    for allocation in lines_allocations:
   384	        line_to_allocations[allocation.order_line_id].append(allocation)
   385	
   386	    allocations_to_update = []
   387	    stocks_to_update = []
   388	    not_dellocated_lines = []
   389	    for line_info in order_lines_data:
   390	        order_line = line_info.line
   391	        quantity = line_info.quantity
   392	        allocations = line_to_allocations[order_line.pk]
   393	        quantity_dealocated = 0
   394	        for allocation in allocations:
   395	            quantity_to_deallocate = min(
   396	                (quantity - quantity_dealocated), allocation.quantity_allocated
   397	            )
   398	            if quantity_to_deallocate > 0:
   399	                allocation.quantity_allocated = (
   400	                    allocation.quantity_allocated - quantity_to_deallocate
   401	                )
   402	                stock = allocation.stock
   403	                stock.quantity_allocated = (
   404	                    F("quantity_allocated") - quantity_to_deallocate
   405	                )
   406	                stocks_to_update.append(stock)
   407	                quantity_dealocated += quantity_to_deallocate
   408	                allocations_to_update.append(allocation)
   409	                if quantity_dealocated == quantity:
   410	                    break
   411	        if not quantity_dealocated == quantity:
   412	            not_dellocated_lines.append(order_line)
   413	
   414	    allocations_before_update = list(
   415	        Allocation.objects.filter(
   416	            id__in=[a.id for a in allocations_to_update]
   417	        ).annotate_stock_available_quantity()
   418	    )
   419	
   420	    Allocation.objects.bulk_update(allocations_to_update, ["quantity_allocated"])
   421	
   422	    legacy_stock_availability = (
   423	        site_settings.use_legacy_shipping_zone_stock_availability
   424	    )
   425	    back_in_stock_stocks: list[Stock] = []
   426	    for allocation_before_update in allocations_before_update:
   427	        available_stock_now = Allocation.objects.available_quantity_for_stock(
   428	            allocation_before_update.stock
   429	        )
   430	        if (
   431	            allocation_before_update.stock_available_quantity <= 0
   432	            and available_stock_now > 0
   433	        ):
   434	            transaction.on_commit(
   435	                lambda: trigger_product_variant_back_in_stock(
   436	                    allocation_before_update.stock, requestor=requestor
   437	                )
   438	            )
   439	            back_in_stock_stocks.append(allocation_before_update.stock)
   440	    if back_in_stock_stocks and not legacy_stock_availability:
   441	        transaction.on_commit(
   442	            partial(
   443	                trigger_back_in_stock_in_channel_events_for_stocks,
   444	                back_in_stock_stocks,
   445	                site_settings,
   446	            )
   447	        )
   448	
   449	    Stock.objects.bulk_update(stocks_to_update, ["quantity_allocated"])
   450	
   451	    if not_dellocated_lines:
   452	        raise AllocationError(not_dellocated_lines)
   453	
   454	
   455	@traced_atomic_transaction()
   456	def increase_stock(
   457	    order_line: OrderLine,
   458	    warehouse: Warehouse,
   459	    quantity: int,
   460	    allocate: bool = False,
   461	):
   462	    """Increse stock quantity for given `order_line` in a given warehouse.
   463	
   464	    Function lock for update stock and allocations related to given `order_line`
   465	    in a given warehouse. If the stock exists, increase the stock quantity
   466	    by given value. If not exist create a stock with the given quantity. This function
   467	    can create the allocation for increased quantity in stock by passing True
   468	    to `allocate` argument. If the order line has the allocation in this stock
   469	    function increase `quantity_allocated`. If allocation does not exist function
   470	    create a new allocation for this order line in this stock.
   471	    """
   472	    assert order_line.variant
   473	    stock = (
   474	        stock_qs_select_for_update()
   475	        .filter(warehouse=warehouse, product_variant=order_line.variant)
   476	        .first()
   477	    )
   478	    if stock:
   479	        stock.increase_stock(quantity, commit=True)
   480	    else:
   481	        stock = Stock.objects.create(
   482	            warehouse=warehouse, product_variant=order_line.variant, quantity=quantity
   483	        )
   484	    if allocate:
   485	        allocation = order_line.allocations.filter(stock=stock).first()
   486	        if allocation:
   487	            allocation.quantity_allocated = F("quantity_allocated") + quantity
   488	            allocation.save(update_fields=["quantity_allocated"])
   489	        else:
   490	            Allocation.objects.create(
   491	                order_line=order_line, stock=stock, quantity_allocated=quantity
   492	            )
   493	        stock.quantity_allocated = F("quantity_allocated") + quantity
   494	        stock.save(update_fields=["quantity_allocated"])
   495	
   496	
   497	def _reduce_quantity_allocated_for_stocks(
   498	    allocations: Iterable[Allocation],
   499	) -> list[Stock]:
   500	    """Reduce quantity allocated for stocks from allocations.
   501	
   502	    This function reduces the quantity allocated for stocks based on the allocations
   503	    associated with them. It takes a list of Allocation objects and returns a list of
   504	    Stock objects with their quantity_allocated field updated.
   505	    """
   506	    stocks_to_update_map: dict[int, Stock] = {
   507	        alloc.stock_id: alloc.stock for alloc in allocations
   508	    }
   509	    quantity_allocated_to_reduce: dict[int, int] = defaultdict(int)
   510	    for alloc in allocations:
   511	        quantity_allocated_to_reduce[alloc.stock_id] += alloc.quantity_allocated
   512	
   513	    for stock_pk, quantity_allocated in quantity_allocated_to_reduce.items():
   514	        stock = stocks_to_update_map[stock_pk]
   515	        stock.quantity_allocated = F("quantity_allocated") - quantity_allocated
   516	    return list(stocks_to_update_map.values())
   517	
   518	
   519	@traced_atomic_transaction()
   520	def increase_allocations(
   521	    lines_info: list["OrderLineInfo"],
   522	    channel: "Channel",
   523	    site_settings: "SiteSettings",
   524	    requestor: T_REQUESTOR,
   525	    calculate_stocks_with_shipping_zones: bool,
   526	):
   527	    """Increase allocation for order lines with appropriate quantity."""
   528	    line_pks = [info.line.pk for info in lines_info]
   529	    allocations = list(
   530	        allocation_with_stock_qs_select_for_update()
   531	        .select_related("order_line")
   532	        .filter(order_line__in=line_pks)
   533	    )
   534	
   535	    # evaluate allocations query to trigger select_for_update lock
   536	    allocation_pks_to_delete = [alloc.pk for alloc in allocations]
   537	    allocation_quantity_map: dict[UUID, list] = defaultdict(list)
   538	
   539	    for alloc in allocations:
   540	        allocation_quantity_map[alloc.order_line.pk].append(alloc.quantity_allocated)
   541	
   542	    for line_info in lines_info:
   543	        allocated = sum(allocation_quantity_map[line_info.line.pk])
   544	        # line_info.quantity resembles amount to add, sum it with already allocated.
   545	        line_info.quantity += allocated
   546	
   547	    # Reduces quantity allocated for stocks from allocations, as `allocate_stocks`
   548	    # will create new allocations.
   549	    stocks_to_update = _reduce_quantity_allocated_for_stocks(allocations=allocations)
   550	
   551	    Allocation.objects.filter(pk__in=allocation_pks_to_delete).delete()
   552	    Stock.objects.bulk_update(stocks_to_update, ["quantity_allocated"])
   553	
   554	    order = lines_info[0].line.order
   555	    country_code = get_active_country(
   556	        channel, order.shipping_address, order.billing_address
   557	    )
   558	    allocate_stocks(
   559	        lines_info,
   560	        country_code,
   561	        channel,
   562	        site_settings,
   563	        requestor,
   564	        calculate_stocks_with_shipping_zones=calculate_stocks_with_shipping_zones,
   565	    )
   566	
   567	
   568	def decrease_allocations(
   569	    lines_info: list["OrderLineInfo"],
   570	    site_settings: "SiteSettings",
   571	    requestor: T_REQUESTOR,
   572	):
   573	    """Decrease allocations for provided order lines."""
   574	    lines_to_deallocate = get_order_lines_to_deallocate(lines_info)
   575	    if not lines_to_deallocate:
   576	        return
   577	    try:
   578	        deallocate_stock(lines_info, site_settings, requestor)
   579	    except AllocationError as exc:
   580	        Allocation.objects.order_by("stock_id").filter(
   581	            order_line__in=exc.order_lines
   582	        ).update(quantity_allocated=0)
   583	
   584	
   585	@traced_atomic_transaction()
   586	def decrease_stock(
   587	    order_lines_info: list["OrderLineInfo"],
   588	    site_settings: "SiteSettings",
   589	    requestor: T_REQUESTOR,
   590	    allow_stock_to_be_exceeded: bool = False,
   591	):
   592	    """Decrease stocks quantities for given `order_lines` in given warehouses.
   593	
   594	    Function deallocate as many quantities as requested if order_line has less quantity
   595	    from requested function deallocate whole quantity. Next function try to find the
   596	    stock in a given warehouse, if stock not exists or have not enough stock,
   597	    the function raise InsufficientStock exception. When the stock has enough quantity
   598	    function decrease it by given value.
   599	    If allow_stock_to_be_exceeded flag is True then quantity could be < 0.
   600	    """
   601	    decrease_allocations(order_lines_info, site_settings, requestor)
   602	
   603	    order_lines_info = get_order_lines_with_track_inventory(order_lines_info)
   604	    if not order_lines_info:
   605	        return
   606	    variants = [line_info.variant for line_info in order_lines_info]
   607	    warehouse_pks = [line_info.warehouse_pk for line_info in order_lines_info]
   608	
   609	    stocks = (
   610	        stock_qs_select_for_update()
   611	        .filter(product_variant__in=variants)
   612	        .filter(warehouse_id__in=warehouse_pks)
   613	        .select_related("product_variant", "warehouse")
   614	    )
   615	
   616	    variant_and_warehouse_to_stock: dict[int, dict[UUID, Stock]] = defaultdict(dict)
   617	    for stock in stocks:
   618	        variant_and_warehouse_to_stock[stock.product_variant_id][stock.warehouse_id] = (
   619	            stock
   620	        )
   621	
   622	    quantity_allocation_list = list(
   623	        Allocation.objects.filter(
   624	            stock__in=stocks,
   625	            quantity_allocated__gt=0,
   626	        )
   627	        .values("stock")
   628	        .annotate(Sum("quantity_allocated"))
   629	    )
   630	
   631	    quantity_allocation_for_stocks: dict[int, int] = defaultdict(int)
   632	    for allocation in quantity_allocation_list:
   633	        quantity_allocation_for_stocks[allocation["stock"]] += allocation[
   634	            "quantity_allocated__sum"
   635	        ]
   636	    _decrease_stocks_quantity(
   637	        order_lines_info,
   638	        variant_and_warehouse_to_stock,
   639	        quantity_allocation_for_stocks,
   640	        allow_stock_to_be_exceeded,
   641	    )
   642	
   643	    stock_ids = (s.id for s in stocks)
   644	    for stock in Stock.objects.filter(id__in=stock_ids).annotate_available_quantity():
   645	        if stock.available_quantity <= 0:
   646	            transaction.on_commit(
   647	                lambda: trigger_product_variant_out_of_stock(stock, requestor=requestor)
   648	            )
   649	
   650	
   651	def _decrease_stocks_quantity(
   652	    order_lines_info: list["OrderLineInfo"],
   653	    variant_and_warehouse_to_stock: dict[int, dict[UUID, Stock]],
   654	    quantity_allocation_for_stocks: dict[int, int],
   655	    allow_stock_to_be_exceeded: bool = False,
   656	):
   657	    insufficient_stocks: list[InsufficientStockData] = []
   658	    stocks_to_update = []
   659	    for line_info in order_lines_info:
   660	        variant = line_info.variant
   661	        if not variant:
   662	            continue
   663	        warehouse_pk = line_info.warehouse_pk
   664	        stock = (
   665	            variant_and_warehouse_to_stock.get(variant.pk, {}).get(warehouse_pk)
   666	            if warehouse_pk
   667	            else None
   668	        )
   669	        if stock is None:
   670	            # If there is no stock but allow_stock_to_be_exceeded == True
   671	            # we proceed with fulfilling the order, treat as error otherwise
   672	            if not allow_stock_to_be_exceeded:
   673	                insufficient_stocks.append(
   674	                    InsufficientStockData(
   675	                        variant=variant,
   676	                        order_line=line_info.line,
   677	                        warehouse_pk=warehouse_pk,
   678	                        available_quantity=0,
   679	                    )
   680	                )
   681	            continue
   682	
   683	        quantity_allocated = quantity_allocation_for_stocks.get(stock.pk, 0)
   684	
   685	        is_stock_exceeded = stock.quantity - quantity_allocated < line_info.quantity
   686	        if is_stock_exceeded and not allow_stock_to_be_exceeded:
   687	            insufficient_stocks.append(
   688	                InsufficientStockData(
   689	                    variant=variant,
   690	                    order_line=line_info.line,
   691	                    warehouse_pk=warehouse_pk,
   692	                    available_quantity=0,
   693	                )
   694	            )
   695	            continue
   696	        stock.quantity = stock.quantity - line_info.quantity
   697	        stocks_to_update.append(stock)
   698	
   699	    if insufficient_stocks:
   700	        raise InsufficientStock(insufficient_stocks)
   701	
   702	    Stock.objects.bulk_update(stocks_to_update, ["quantity"])
   703

   705	def _get_variant_for_order_line_info(
   706	    order_line_info: OrderLineInfo,
   707	) -> ProductVariant | None:
   708	    variant = order_line_info.variant
   709	    if not variant and order_line_info.line.variant_id:
   710	        variant = order_line_info.line.variant
   711	        order_line_info.variant = variant
   712	    return variant

   715	def get_order_lines_with_track_inventory(
   716	    order_lines_info: list["OrderLineInfo"],
   717	) -> list["OrderLineInfo"]:
   718	    """Return order lines with variants with track inventory set to True."""
   719	
   720	    lines_to_return = []
   721	    for line_info in order_lines_info:
   722	        variant = _get_variant_for_order_line_info(line_info)
   723	
   724	        if not variant:
   725	            continue
   726	        if variant.is_preorder_active():
   727	            continue
   728	        if not variant.track_inventory:
   729	            continue
   730	        lines_to_return.append(line_info)
   731	    return lines_to_return
   732	
   733	
   734	def get_order_lines_to_deallocate(
   735	    order_lines_info: list["OrderLineInfo"],
   736	) -> list["OrderLineInfo"]:
   737	    """Get order lines to deallocate.
   738	
   739	    The function returns the lines with active track inventory and the lines where track
   740	    inventory was turned off but for some reason the allocations are present.
   741	    Case like turning on & off the track-inventory.
   742	    """
   743	
   744	    order_lines_info_map = {
   745	        line_info.line.id: line_info for line_info in order_lines_info
   746	    }
   747	
   748	    lines_to_deallocate = []
   749	    existing_allocations = Allocation.objects.filter(
   750	        order_line_id__in=order_lines_info_map.keys(),
   751	    )
   752	    for allocation in existing_allocations:
   753	        line_to_deallocate = order_lines_info_map.get(allocation.order_line_id)
   754	        if line_to_deallocate is None:
   755	            continue
   756	        _get_variant_for_order_line_info(line_to_deallocate)
   757	        lines_to_deallocate.append(line_to_deallocate)
   758	
   759	    return lines_to_deallocate
   760

   762	@traced_atomic_transaction()
   763	def deallocate_stock_for_orders(
   764	    orders_ids: list[UUID],
   765	    site_settings: "SiteSettings",
   766	    requestor: T_REQUESTOR,
   767	):
   768	    """Remove all allocations for given orders."""
   769	    # local import: to be removed when all webhook logic will be moved outside plugin
   770	    from .channel_stock_availability import (
   771	        trigger_back_in_stock_in_channel_events_for_stocks,
   772	    )
   773	
   774	    lines = OrderLine.objects.filter(order_id__in=orders_ids)
   775	    allocations = allocation_with_stock_qs_select_for_update().filter(
   776	        Exists(lines.filter(id=OuterRef("order_line_id"))), quantity_allocated__gt=0
   777	    )
   778	
   779	    stocks_to_update = _reduce_quantity_allocated_for_stocks(allocations)
   780	
   781	    allocations_for_back_in_stock = Allocation.objects.filter(
   782	        id__in=[allocation.id for allocation in allocations]
   783	    )
   784	
   785	    legacy_stock_availability = (
   786	        site_settings.use_legacy_shipping_zone_stock_availability
   787	    )
   788	    back_in_stock_stocks: list[Stock] = []
   789	    for allocation in allocations_for_back_in_stock.annotate_stock_available_quantity():
   790	        if allocation.stock_available_quantity <= 0:
   791	            transaction.on_commit(
   792	                lambda: trigger_product_variant_back_in_stock(
   793	                    allocation.stock, requestor=requestor
   794	                )
   795	            )
   796	            back_in_stock_stocks.append(allocation.stock)
   797	    if back_in_stock_stocks and not legacy_stock_availability:
   798	        transaction.on_commit(
   799	            partial(
   800	                trigger_back_in_stock_in_channel_events_for_stocks,
   801	                back_in_stock_stocks,
   802	                site_settings,
   803	            )
   804	        )
   805	
   806	    allocations.update(quantity_allocated=0)
   807	    Stock.objects.bulk_update(stocks_to_update, ["quantity_allocated"])
   808

   810	@traced_atomic_transaction()
   811	def allocate_preorders(
   812	    order_lines_info: list["OrderLineInfo"],
   813	    channel_slug: str,
   814	    check_reservations: bool = False,
   815	    checkout_lines: Iterable["CheckoutLine"] | None = None,
   816	):
   817	    """Allocate preorder variant for given `order_lines` in given channel."""
   818	    order_lines_info = get_order_lines_with_preorder(order_lines_info)
   819	    if not order_lines_info:
   820	        return
   821	
   822	    variants = [line_info.variant for line_info in order_lines_info]
   823	
   824	    all_variants_channel_listings = (
   825	        ProductVariantChannelListing.objects.filter(variant__in=variants)
   826	        .select_for_update(of=("self",))
   827	        .select_related("channel")
   828	        .values("id", "channel__slug", "preorder_quantity_threshold", "variant_id")
   829	    )
   830	    all_variants_channel_listings_id = [
   831	        channel_listing["id"] for channel_listing in all_variants_channel_listings
   832	    ]
   833	
   834	    quantity_allocation_list = list(
   835	        PreorderAllocation.objects.filter(
   836	            product_variant_channel_listing_id__in=all_variants_channel_listings_id,  # noqa: E501
   837	            quantity__gt=0,
   838	        )
   839	        .values("product_variant_channel_listing")
   840	        .annotate(preorder_quantity_allocated=Sum("quantity"))
   841	    )
   842	    quantity_allocation_for_channel: dict = defaultdict(int)
   843	    for allocation in quantity_allocation_list:
   844	        quantity_allocation_for_channel[
   845	            allocation["product_variant_channel_listing"]
   846	        ] = allocation["preorder_quantity_allocated"]
   847	
   848	    variants_to_channel_listings = {
   849	        channel_listing["variant_id"]: (
   850	            channel_listing["id"],
   851	            channel_listing["preorder_quantity_threshold"],
   852	        )
   853	        for channel_listing in all_variants_channel_listings
   854	        if channel_listing["channel__slug"] == channel_slug
   855	    }
   856	
   857	    variants_channel_listings = defaultdict(list)
   858	    for channel_listing in all_variants_channel_listings:
   859	        variants_channel_listings[channel_listing["variant_id"]].append(
   860	            channel_listing["id"]
   861	        )
   862	
   863	    if check_reservations:
   864	        quantity_reservation_list = (
   865	            PreorderReservation.objects.filter(
   866	                product_variant_channel_listing_id__in=all_variants_channel_listings_id,  # noqa: E501
   867	                quantity_reserved__gt=0,
   868	            )
   869	            .not_expired()
   870	            .exclude_checkout_lines(checkout_lines)
   871	            .values("product_variant_channel_listing")
   872	            .annotate(quantity_reserved_sum=Sum("quantity_reserved"))
   873	        )
   874	        listings_reservations: dict = defaultdict(int)
   875	        for reservation in quantity_reservation_list:
   876	            listings_reservations[reservation["product_variant_channel_listing"]] += (
   877	                reservation["quantity_reserved_sum"]
   878	            )
   879	    else:
   880	        listings_reservations = defaultdict(int)
   881	
   882	    variants_global_allocations: dict[int, int] = defaultdict(int)
   883	    for channel_listing in all_variants_channel_listings:
   884	        variants_global_allocations[channel_listing["variant_id"]] += (
   885	            quantity_allocation_for_channel[channel_listing["id"]]
   886	        )
   887	
   888	    insufficient_stocks: list[InsufficientStockData] = []
   889	    allocations: list[PreorderAllocation] = []
   890	    for line_info in order_lines_info:
   891	        variant = cast(ProductVariant, line_info.variant)
   892	        allocation_item, insufficient_stock = _create_preorder_allocation(
   893	            line_info,
   894	            variants_to_channel_listings[variant.id],
   895	            variants_global_allocations[variant.id],
   896	            variants_channel_listings[variant.id],
   897	            quantity_allocation_for_channel,
   898	            listings_reservations,
   899	        )
   900	        if allocation_item:
   901	            allocations.append(allocation_item)
   902	        if insufficient_stock:
   903	            insufficient_stocks.append(insufficient_stock)
   904	
   905	    if insufficient_stocks:
   906	        raise InsufficientStock(insufficient_stocks)
   907	
   908	    if allocations:
   909	        PreorderAllocation.objects.bulk_create(allocations)

1	from collections.abc import Iterable
     2	from typing import TYPE_CHECKING, cast

     7	from ..core.prices import quantize_price
     8	from ..core.taxes import zero_money
     9	from ..discount import DiscountType, DiscountValueType
    10	from ..discount.models import OrderDiscount
    11	from ..discount.utils.manual_discount import apply_discount_to_value
    12	from ..discount.utils.voucher import is_order_level_voucher, is_shipping_voucher
    13	from .interface import OrderTaxedPricesData
    14	
    15	if TYPE_CHECKING:
    16	    from .models import Order, OrderLine
    17	
    18	
    19	# We need this function to don't break Avalara Excise.
    20	def base_order_shipping(order: "Order") -> Money:
    21	    return order.base_shipping_price
    22

    24	def base_order_subtotal(order: "Order", lines: Iterable["OrderLine"]) -> Money:
    25	    """Return order subtotal.
    26	
    27	    May include order line level discounts, like promotions, specific product vouchers
    28	    and manual line discounts.
    29	    Does not include order level discounts, like entire order vouchers and manual
    30	    order discounts.
    31	    """
    32	    currency = order.currency
    33	    subtotal = zero_money(currency)
    34	    for line in lines:
    35	        quantity = line.quantity
    36	        base_line_total = line.base_unit_price * quantity
    37	        subtotal += base_line_total
    38	
    39	    return quantize_price(subtotal, currency)
    40	
    41	
    42	def base_order_total(
    43	    order: "Order",
    44	    lines: Iterable["OrderLine"],
    45	    database_connection_name: str = settings.DATABASE_CONNECTION_DEFAULT_NAME,
    46	) -> Money:
    47	    """Return order total, recalculate, and update order discounts.
    48	
    49	    All discounts are included in this price.
    50	    """
    51	    subtotal, shipping_price = calculate_prices(
    52	        order,
    53	        lines,
    54	        assign_prices=False,
    55	        database_connection_name=database_connection_name,
    56	    )
    57	    return subtotal + shipping_price
    58	
    59	
    60	def base_order_line_total(order_line: "OrderLine") -> OrderTaxedPricesData:
    61	    """Return order line base total.
    62	
    63	    May include order line level discounts, like promotions, specific product vouchers
    64	    and manual line discounts.
    65	    Does not include order level discounts, like entire order vouchers and manual
    66	    order discounts.
    67	    """
    68	    quantity = order_line.quantity
    69	    price_with_line_discounts = (
    70	        TaxedMoney(order_line.base_unit_price, order_line.base_unit_price) * quantity
    71	    )
    72	    undiscounted_price = (
    73	        TaxedMoney(
    74	            order_line.undiscounted_base_unit_price,
    75	            order_line.undiscounted_base_unit_price,
    76	        )
    77	        * quantity
    78	    )
    79	    return OrderTaxedPricesData(
    80	        undiscounted_price=undiscounted_price,
    81	        price_with_discounts=price_with_line_discounts,
    82	    )
    83	
    84	
    85	def propagate_order_discount_on_order_prices(
    86	    order: "Order",
    87	    lines: Iterable["OrderLine"],
    88	) -> tuple[Money, Money]:
    89	    """Propagate the order discount on order.subtotal and order.shipping_price.
    90	
    91	    The function returns the subtotal and shipping price after applying the order
    92	    discount.
    93	    """
    94	    base_subtotal = base_order_subtotal(order, lines)
    95	    subtotal = base_subtotal
    96	    shipping_price = order.base_shipping_price
    97	    currency = order.currency
    98	    order_discounts_to_update = []
    99	
   100	    for order_discount in order.discounts.all():
   101	        subtotal_before_discount = subtotal
   102	        shipping_price_before_discount = shipping_price
   103	        if order_discount.type == DiscountType.VOUCHER:
   104	            voucher = order_discount.voucher
   105	            if is_order_level_voucher(voucher):
   106	                subtotal = apply_discount_to_value(
   107	                    value=order_discount.value,
   108	                    value_type=order_discount.value_type,
   109	                    currency=currency,
   110	                    price_to_discount=subtotal,
   111	                )
   112	            # Shipping voucher is tricky: it is associated with an order, but it
   113	            # decreases base price, similar to line level discounts, so we should
   114	            # exclude it
   115	            if is_shipping_voucher(order_discount.voucher):
   116	                continue
   117	
   118	        elif order_discount.type == DiscountType.ORDER_PROMOTION:
   119	            subtotal = apply_discount_to_value(
   120	                value=order_discount.value,
   121	                value_type=order_discount.value_type,
   122	                currency=currency,
   123	                price_to_discount=subtotal,
   124	            )
   125	        elif order_discount.type == DiscountType.MANUAL:
   126	            if order_discount.value_type == DiscountValueType.PERCENTAGE:
   127	                subtotal = apply_discount_to_value(
   128	                    value=order_discount.value,
   129	                    value_type=order_discount.value_type,
   130	                    currency=currency,
   131	                    price_to_discount=subtotal,
   132	                )
   133	                shipping_price = apply_discount_to_value(
   134	                    value=order_discount.value,
   135	                    value_type=order_discount.value_type,
   136	                    currency=currency,
   137	                    price_to_discount=shipping_price,
   138	                )
   139	            elif order_discount.value_type == DiscountValueType.FIXED:
   140	                temporary_undiscounted_total = subtotal + shipping_price
   141	                if temporary_undiscounted_total.amount > 0:
   142	                    temporary_total = apply_discount_to_value(
   143	                        value=order_discount.value,
   144	                        value_type=order_discount.value_type,
   145	                        currency=currency,
   146	                        price_to_discount=temporary_undiscounted_total,
   147	                    )
   148	                    total_discount = temporary_undiscounted_total - temporary_total
   149	                    subtotal_discount = (
   150	                        subtotal / temporary_undiscounted_total
   151	                    ) * total_discount
   152	                    shipping_discount = total_discount - subtotal_discount
   153	
   154	                    subtotal -= subtotal_discount
   155	                    shipping_price -= shipping_discount
   156	        shipping_discount_amount = shipping_price_before_discount - shipping_price
   157	        subtotal_discount_amount = subtotal_before_discount - subtotal
   158	        total_discount_amount = shipping_discount_amount + subtotal_discount_amount
   159	        if order_discount.amount != total_discount_amount:
   160	            order_discount.amount = total_discount_amount
   161	            order_discounts_to_update.append(order_discount)
   162	
   163	    if order_discounts_to_update:
   164	        OrderDiscount.objects.bulk_update(order_discounts_to_update, ["amount_value"])
   165	
   166	    return subtotal, shipping_price
   167	
   168	
   169	def calculate_prices(
   170	    order: "Order",
   171	    lines: Iterable["OrderLine"],
   172	    assign_prices=True,
   173	    database_connection_name: str = settings.DATABASE_CONNECTION_DEFAULT_NAME,
   174	) -> tuple[Money, Money]:
   175	    """Calculate prices after applying order level discounts.
   176	
   177	    Handles manual discounts, ENTIRE_ORDER vouchers and ORDER_PROMOTION.
   178	    Shipping vouchers are included in the base shipping price.
   179	    Specific product vouchers are included in line base prices.
   180	    Entire order vouchers are recalculated and updated in this function
   181	    (OrderDiscounts with type `order_discount.type == DiscountType.VOUCHER`).
   182	    Staff order discounts are recalculated and updated in this function
   183	    (OrderDiscounts with type `order_discount.type == DiscountType.MANUAL`).
   184	    """
   185	    base_subtotal = base_order_subtotal(order, lines)
   186	
   187	    subtotal, shipping_price = propagate_order_discount_on_order_prices(order, lines)
   188	
   189	    if assign_prices:
   190	        assign_order_prices(
   191	            order,
   192	            lines,
   193	            subtotal,
   194	            shipping_price,
   195	            database_connection_name=database_connection_name,
   196	        )
   197	        subtotal_discount = base_subtotal - subtotal
   198	        apply_subtotal_discount_to_order_lines(lines, base_subtotal, subtotal_discount)
   199	
   200	    return subtotal, shipping_price
   201	
   202	
   203	def _get_total_price_with_subtotal_discount_for_order_line(
   204	    line: "OrderLine", discount: Money
   205	) -> Money:
   206	    """Get subtotal discount for a given order line."""
   207	
   208	    currency = discount.currency
   209	    # This price includes line level discounts, but not entire order ones.
   210	    base_line_total = base_order_line_total(line).price_with_discounts.net
   211	    total_price = max(base_line_total - discount, zero_money(currency))
   212	    return total_price

    85	        if tax_strategy == TaxCalculationStrategy.TAX_APP and not allow_sync_webhooks:

   106	def process_order_promotion(
   107	    order: Order,
   108	    lines_info: list[EditableOrderLineInfo],
   109	    database_connection_name: str = settings.DATABASE_CONNECTION_DEFAULT_NAME,
   110	):
   111	    with allow_writer_for_default_connection(database_connection_name):

   117	def process_order_prices(
   118	    order: Order,
   119	    manager: PluginsManager,
   120	    requestor: Union["App", "User", None],
   121	    lines: list[OrderLine],
   122	    database_connection_name: str = settings.DATABASE_CONNECTION_DEFAULT_NAME,
   123	) -> Promise[tuple[Order, Iterable[OrderLine]]]:
   124	    def process_calculation_result(_):
   125	        order.should_refresh_prices = False
   126	        with allow_writer():
   127	            with transaction.atomic(savepoint=False):
   128	                try:
   129	                    locked_order = (
   130	                        order_qs_select_for_update().only("updated_at").get(id=order.id)
   131	                    )
   132	                except Order.DoesNotExist:
   133	                    # Order was removed. Return data without saving.
   134	                    return order, lines
   135	
   136	                # Check whether the order has been modified during the recalculation process by another process.
   137	                # If so, we should skip saving. The same applies if the order has been removed. This is important
   138	                # to avoid overwriting changes made by the other requests. Skipping the save function does not affect
   139	                # the query response because it returns the adjusted order and line info objects.
   140	                if locked_order.updated_at == order.updated_at:
   141	                    order.save(
   142	                        update_fields=[
   143	                            "subtotal_net_amount",
   144	                            "subtotal_gross_amount",
   145	                            "total_net_amount",
   146	                            "total_gross_amount",
   147	                            "undiscounted_total_net_amount",
   148	                            "undiscounted_total_gross_amount",
   149	                            "shipping_price_net_amount",
   150	                            "shipping_price_gross_amount",
   151	                            "base_shipping_price_amount",
   152	                            "shipping_tax_rate",
   153	                            "should_refresh_prices",
   154	                            "tax_error",
   155	                        ]
   156	                    )
   157	                    order.lines.bulk_update(
   158	                        lines,
   159	                        [
   160	                            "unit_price_net_amount",
   161	                            "unit_price_gross_amount",
   162	                            "undiscounted_unit_price_net_amount",
   163	                            "undiscounted_unit_price_gross_amount",
   164	                            "total_price_net_amount",
   165	                            "total_price_gross_amount",
   166	                            "undiscounted_total_price_net_amount",
   167	                            "undiscounted_total_price_gross_amount",
   168	                            "tax_rate",
   169	                        ],
   170	                    )
   171	            return order, lines
   172	
   173	    with allow_writer_for_default_connection(database_connection_name):
   174	        calculate_prices(
   175	            order,
   176	            lines,
   177	            database_connection_name=database_connection_name,
   178	        )
   179	
   180	        tax_strategy = get_tax_calculation_strategy_for_order(order)
   181	
   182	        return calculate_taxes(
   183	            order,
   184	            manager,
   185	            lines,
   186	            tax_calculation_strategy=tax_strategy,
   187	            database_connection_name=database_connection_name,
   188	            requestor=requestor,
   189	        ).then(process_calculation_result)
   190

   192	def fetch_order_prices_if_expired(
   193	    order: Order,
   194	    manager: PluginsManager,
   195	    requestor: Union["App", "User", None],
   196	    lines: Iterable[OrderLine] | None = None,
   197	    force_update: bool = False,
   198	    database_connection_name: str = settings.DATABASE_CONNECTION_DEFAULT_NAME,
   199	    allow_sync_webhooks: bool = True,
   200	) -> Promise[tuple[Order, Iterable[OrderLine]]]:
   201	    """Fetch order prices with taxes.
   202	
   203	    First applies order level discounts, then calculates taxes.
   204	
   205	    Prices will be updated if force_update is True
   206	    or if order.should_refresh_prices is True.
   207	    """
   208	
   209	    expired_line_ids = get_expired_line_ids(order, lines)
   210	    if not should_refresh_prices(
   211	        order=order,
   212	        force_update=force_update,
   213	        expired_line_ids=expired_line_ids,
   214	        database_connection_name=database_connection_name,
   215	        allow_sync_webhooks=allow_sync_webhooks,
   216	    ):
   217	        return Promise.resolve((order, lines or []))
   218	
   219	    lines_info = prepare_order_lines_for_refresh(
   220	        order=order,
   221	        lines=lines,
   222	        expired_line_ids=expired_line_ids,
   223	        database_connection_name=database_connection_name,
   224	    )
   225	
   226	    if lines_info is None:
   227	        return Promise.resolve((order, lines or []))
   228	
   229	    process_order_promotion(
   230	        order, lines_info, database_connection_name=database_connection_name
   231	    )
   232	
   233	    return process_order_prices(
   234	        order=order,
   235	        manager=manager,
   236	        requestor=requestor,
   237	        lines=[line_info.line for line_info in lines_info],
   238	        database_connection_name=database_connection_name,
   239	    )

   189	def _order_has_negative_prices(order: "Order", lines: list["OrderLineInfo"]) -> bool:
   190	    if not order:
   191	        logger.error("Received None as order to check for negative prices")
   192	        return False
   193	
   194	    if list(
   195	        filter(
   196	            lambda x: x < 0,
   197	            [
   198	                order.shipping_price_net_amount,
   199	                order.shipping_price_gross_amount,
   200	                order.total_net_amount,
   201	                order.total_gross_amount,
   202	                order.subtotal_net_amount,
   203	                order.subtotal_gross_amount,
   204	            ],
   205	        )
   206	    ):
   207	        return True
   208	    if lines is None:
   209	        logger.error(
   210	            "Received None as order lines to check for negative prices",
   211	            extra=_get_extra_for_order_logger(order),
   212	        )
   213	        return False
   214	    for line_info in lines:
   215	        line = line_info.line
   216	        if not line:
   217	            logger.error(
   218	                "Received None as order line to check for negative prices",
   219	                extra=_get_extra_for_order_logger(order),
   220	            )
   221	            continue
   222	        if list(
   223	            filter(
   224	                lambda x: x < 0,
   225	                [
   226	                    line.unit_price_net_amount,
   227	                    line.unit_price_gross_amount,
   228	                    line.total_price_net_amount,
   229	                    line.total_price_gross_amount,
   230	                ],
   231	            )
   232	        ):
   233	            return True
   234	    return False

   242	    logger.error("Order with negative prices detected", extra=extra)

   245	def call_order_events(
   246	    manager: "PluginsManager",
   247	    event_names: list[str],
   248	    order: "Order",
   249	    webhook_event_map: dict[str, set["Webhook"]] | None = None,
   250	):
   251	    missing_events = set(event_names).difference(ORDER_WEBHOOK_EVENT_MAP.keys())
   252	    if missing_events:
   253	        raise ValueError(
   254	            f"Events {missing_events} not found in ORDER_WEBHOOK_EVENT_MAP."
   255	        )
   256	
   257	    if webhook_event_map is None:
   258	        webhook_event_map = get_webhooks_for_multiple_events(event_names)
   259	
   260	    for event_name in event_names:
   261	        plugin_manager_method_name = ORDER_WEBHOOK_EVENT_MAP[event_name]
   262	        webhooks = webhook_event_map.get(event_name, set())
   263	        event_func = getattr(manager, plugin_manager_method_name)
   264	        call_event(event_func, order, webhooks=webhooks)
   265	
   266	
   267	def call_order_event(
   268	    manager: "PluginsManager",
   269	    event_name: str,
   270	    order: "Order",
   271	    webhook_event_map: dict[str, set["Webhook"]] | None = None,
   272	):
   273	    if event_name not in ORDER_WEBHOOK_EVENT_MAP:
   274	        raise ValueError(f"Event {event_name} not found in ORDER_WEBHOOK_EVENT_MAP.")
   275	
   276	    plugin_manager_method_name = ORDER_WEBHOOK_EVENT_MAP[event_name]
   277	    event_func = getattr(manager, plugin_manager_method_name)
   278	
   279	    if webhook_event_map is None:
   280	        webhook_event_map = get_webhooks_for_multiple_events([event_name])
   281	
   282	    webhooks = webhook_event_map.get(event_name, set())
   283	
   284	    call_event(event_func, order, webhooks=webhooks)

   287	def order_created(
   288	    order_info: "OrderInfo",
   289	    user: User | None,
   290	    app: Optional["App"],
   291	    manager: "PluginsManager",
   292	    from_draft: bool = False,
   293	    site_settings: Optional["SiteSettings"] = None,
   294	    automatic: bool = False,
   295	):
   296	    order = order_info.order
   297	
   298	    if order.tax_error is not None and not order.is_draft():
   299	        order_id = graphene.Node.to_global_id("Order", order.pk)
   300	        logger.error(
   301	            "Created non-draft order with tax_error for order: %s",
   302	            order_id,
   303	            extra={"tax_error": order.tax_error, "order_id": order_id},
   304	        )
   305	
   306	    if order_user := order.user:
   307	        order_user.number_of_orders = F("number_of_orders") + 1
   308	        order_user.save(update_fields=["number_of_orders"])

    93	def invalidate_order_prices(order: Order, *, save: bool = False) -> None:
    94	    """Mark order as ready for prices recalculation.
    95	
    96	    Does nothing if order is not editable
    97	    (it's status is neither draft, nor unconfirmed).
    98	
    99	    By default, no save to database is executed.
   100	    Either manually call `order.save()` after, or pass `save=True`.
   101	    """
   102	    if order.status not in ORDER_EDITABLE_STATUS:
   103	        return
   104	
   105	    order.should_refresh_prices = True
   106	
   107	    if save:
   108	        order.save(update_fields=["should_refresh_prices", "updated_at"])

   111	def recalculate_order_weight(order: Order, *, save: bool = False):
   112	    """Recalculate order weights.
   113	
   114	    By default, no save to database is executed.
   115	    Either manually call `order.save()` after, or pass `save=True`.
   116	    """
   117	    weight = zero_weight()
   118	    for line in order.lines.all():
   119	        if line.variant:
   120	            weight += line.variant.get_weight() * line.quantity
   121	    weight.unit = order.weight.unit
   122	    order.weight = weight
   123	    if save:
   124	        order.save(update_fields=["weight", "updated_at"])

   127	def _calculate_quantity_including_returns(order):
   128	    lines = list(order.lines.all())
   129	    total_quantity = sum([line.quantity for line in lines])
   130	    quantity_fulfilled = sum([line.quantity_fulfilled for line in lines])
   131	    quantity_returned = 0
   132	    quantity_replaced = 0
   133	    quantity_awaiting_approval = 0
   134	    for fulfillment in order.fulfillments.all():
   135	        # count returned quantity for order
   136	        if fulfillment.status in [
   137	            FulfillmentStatus.RETURNED,
   138	            FulfillmentStatus.REFUNDED_AND_RETURNED,
   139	        ]:
   140	            quantity_returned += fulfillment.get_total_quantity()
   141	        # count replaced quantity for order
   142	        elif fulfillment.status == FulfillmentStatus.REPLACED:
   143	            quantity_replaced += fulfillment.get_total_quantity()
   144	        elif fulfillment.status == FulfillmentStatus.WAITING_FOR_APPROVAL:
   145	            quantity_awaiting_approval += fulfillment.get_total_quantity()
   146	
   147	    # Subtract the replace quantity as it shouldn't be taken into consideration for
   148	    # calculating the order status
   149	    total_quantity -= quantity_replaced
   150	    quantity_fulfilled -= quantity_replaced
   151	    return (
   152	        total_quantity,
   153	        quantity_fulfilled,
   154	        quantity_returned,
   155	        quantity_awaiting_approval,
   156	    )

   159	def refresh_order_status(order: Order):
   160	    """Refresh order status based on the most recent data.
   161	
   162	    This function recalculates the order status using the most up-to-date information
   163	    about fulfillments, returns, and replacements. It should always be called within
   164	    a transaction and with the order locked to ensure data consistency and prevent race conditions.
   165	
   166	    Returns
   167	        bool: True if the order status was changed, False otherwise.
   168	
   169	    """
   170	    old_status = order.status
   171	    # Calculate the quantities for the most recent data
   172	    (
   173	        total_quantity,
   174	        quantity_fulfilled,
   175	        quantity_returned,
   176	        quantity_awaiting_approval,
   177	    ) = _calculate_quantity_including_returns(order)
   178	
   179	    all_products_replaced = total_quantity == 0
   180	    if all_products_replaced:
   181	        return False
   182	
   183	    order.status = determine_order_status(
   184	        total_quantity,
   185	        quantity_fulfilled,
   186	        quantity_returned,
   187	        quantity_awaiting_approval,
   188	    )
   189	    return old_status != order.status
   190	
   191	
   192	def update_order_status(order: Order):
   193	    """Update order status depending on fulfillments."""
   194	    with transaction.atomic():
   195	        # Add a transaction block to ensure that the order status won't be overridden by
   196	        # another process.
   197	        locked_order = Order.objects.select_for_update().get(pk=order.pk)
   198	
   199	        status_updated = refresh_order_status(locked_order)
   200	
   201	        # we would like to update the status for the order provided as the argument
   202	        # to ensure that the reference order has up to date status
   203	        if status_updated:
   204	            # We need to update the order status in original order object to ensure that
   205	            # the status is updated in the mutation response.
   206	            order.status = locked_order.status
   207	            locked_order.save(update_fields=["status", "updated_at"])
   208	
   209	
   210	def determine_order_status(
   211	    total_quantity: int,
   212	    quantity_fulfilled: int,
   213	    quantity_returned: int,
   214	    quantity_awaiting_approval: int,
   215	):
   216	    if quantity_fulfilled - quantity_awaiting_approval <= 0:
   217	        status = OrderStatus.UNFULFILLED
   218	    elif 0 < quantity_returned < total_quantity:
   219	        status = OrderStatus.PARTIALLY_RETURNED
   220	    elif quantity_returned == total_quantity:
   221	        status = OrderStatus.RETURNED
   222	    elif quantity_fulfilled - quantity_awaiting_approval < total_quantity:
   223	        status = OrderStatus.PARTIALLY_FULFILLED
   224	    else:
   225	        status = OrderStatus.FULFILLED
   226	    return status

    65	    @cached_property
    66	    def variant_discounted_price(self) -> Money:
    67	        """Return the discounted variant price.
    68	
    69	        `variant_discounted_price` means price with the most beneficial applicable
    70	        catalogue promotion.
    71	        If listing is present return the discounted price from the listing,
    72	        if listing is not present, calculate current unit price based on
    73	        `undiscounted_unit_price` and catalogue promotion discounts.
    74	        """
    75	
    76	        # if price_override is set, it takes precedence over any other price for
    77	        # further calculations
    78	        if self.line.price_override is not None:
    79	            return Money(self.line.price_override, self.line.currency)
    80	
    81	        if self.channel_listing and self.channel_listing.discounted_price is not None:
    82	            return self.channel_listing.discounted_price
    83	
    84	        catalogue_discounts = self.get_catalogue_discounts()
    85	        total_price = self.undiscounted_unit_price * self.line.quantity
    86	        for discount in catalogue_discounts:
    87	            total_price -= discount.amount
    88	
    89	        unit_price = max(
    90	            total_price / self.line.quantity, zero_money(self.line.currency)
    91	        )

    76	def invalidate_checkout(
    77	    checkout_info: "CheckoutInfo",
    78	    lines: list["CheckoutLineInfo"],
    79	    manager: "PluginsManager",
    80	    *,
    81	    recalculate_discount: bool = True,
    82	    save: bool,
    83	) -> list[str]:
    84	    """Mark checkout as ready for prices recalculation."""
    85	    if recalculate_discount:
    86	        recalculate_checkout_discounts(checkout_info, lines, manager)
    87	
    88	    updated_fields = invalidate_checkout_prices(checkout_info, save=save)
    89	    return updated_fields

    92	def recalculate_checkout_discounts(
    93	    checkout_info: "CheckoutInfo",
    94	    lines: list["CheckoutLineInfo"],
    95	    manager: "PluginsManager",
    96	):
    97	    """Recalculate checkout discounts.
    98	
    99	    Update line and checkout discounts from vouchers and promotions.
   100	    Create or remove gift line if needed.
   101	    """
   102	    create_checkout_line_discount_objects_for_catalogue_promotions(lines)
   103	    recalculate_checkout_discount(manager, checkout_info, lines)

   106	def invalidate_checkout_prices(
   107	    checkout_info: "CheckoutInfo",
   108	    *,
   109	    save: bool,
   110	) -> list[str]:
   111	    """Mark checkout as ready for prices recalculation."""
   112	    checkout = checkout_info.checkout
   113	
   114	    price_expiration = timezone.now()
   115	    checkout.price_expiration = price_expiration
   116	    checkout.discount_expiration = price_expiration
   117	    updated_fields = ["price_expiration", "discount_expiration", "last_change"]
   118	
   119	    if save:
   120	        checkout.save(update_fields=updated_fields)
   121	
   122	    return updated_fields

   125	def checkout_lines_bulk_update(
   126	    lines_to_update: list["CheckoutLine"], fields_to_update: list[str]
   127	):
   128	    """Bulk update on CheckoutLines with lock applied on them."""
   129	    with transaction.atomic():
   130	        _locked_lines = list(
   131	            checkout_lines_qs_select_for_update()
   132	            .filter(id__in=[line.id for line in lines_to_update])
   133	            .values_list("id", flat=True)
   134	        )
   135	        CheckoutLine.objects.bulk_update(lines_to_update, fields_to_update)
   136	
   137	
   138	def checkout_lines_bulk_delete(line_pks_to_delete: list[UUID]):
   139	    """Delete CheckoutLines with lock applied on them."""
   140	    with transaction.atomic():
   141	        CheckoutLine.objects.filter(
   142	            id__in=checkout_lines_qs_select_for_update()
   143	            .filter(pk__in=line_pks_to_delete)
   144	            .values_list("id", flat=True)
   145	        ).delete()
   146	
   147	
   148	def delete_checkouts(checkout_pks_to_delete: list[UUID]) -> int:
   149	    """Delete a checkouts with lock applied on them."""
   150	    with transaction.atomic():
   151	        CheckoutLine.objects.filter(
   152	            id__in=checkout_lines_qs_select_for_update()
   153	            .filter(checkout_id__in=checkout_pks_to_delete)
   154	            .values_list("id", flat=True)
   155	        ).delete()
   156	        locked_pks = list(
   157	            checkout_qs_select_for_update()
   158	            .filter(pk__in=checkout_pks_to_delete)
   159	            .values_list("pk", flat=True)
   160	        )
   161	        deleted_count, _ = Checkout.objects.filter(pk__in=locked_pks).delete()
   162	    return deleted_count

   179	def add_variants_to_checkout(
   180	    checkout,
   181	    variants,
   182	    checkout_lines_data,
   183	    channel,
   184	    replace=False,
   185	    replace_reservations=False,
   186	    reservation_length: int | None = None,
   187	    raise_error_for_missing_lines=False,
   188	    *,
   189	    calculate_stocks_with_shipping_zones: bool,
   190	):
   191	    """Add variants to checkout.
   192	
   193	    If a variant is not placed in checkout, a new checkout line will be created.
   194	    If quantity is set to 0, checkout line will be deleted.
   195	    Otherwise, quantity will be added or replaced (if replace argument is True).
   196	    When `raise_error_for_missing_lines` is set to True, raise error when any line from
   197	    the input is not assigned to provided checkout.
   198	    """
   199	    country_code = checkout.get_country()
   200	    with transaction.atomic():
   201	        # We need to lock checkout first to avoid deadlocks.
   202	        # When this function try to create new lines, the checkout is locked after
   203	        # the lines are locked manually. We should always lock checkout first to
   204	        # avoid deadlocks.
   205	        try:
   206	            _locked_checkout = (
   207	                checkout_qs_select_for_update().only("pk").get(token=checkout.token)
   208	            )
   209	        except Checkout.DoesNotExist as e:
   210	            raise NonExistingCheckout(checkout.token) from e
   211	
   212	        checkout_lines = list(
   213	            checkout_lines_qs_select_for_update()
   214	            .select_related("variant")
   215	            .filter(checkout_id=checkout.pk)
   216	        )
   217	        lines_by_id = {str(line.pk): line for line in checkout_lines}
   218	        variants_map = {str(variant.pk): variant for variant in variants}
   219	
   220	        new_variant_ids = set()
   221	        non_existing_line_ids = set()
   222	        for line_data in checkout_lines_data:
   223	            if line_data.line_id and line_data.line_id not in lines_by_id:
   224	                non_existing_line_ids.add(line_data.line_id)
   225	                new_variant_ids.add(line_data.variant_id)
   226	            elif not line_data.line_id and line_data.variant_id:
   227	                new_variant_ids.add(line_data.variant_id)
   228	
   229	        if raise_error_for_missing_lines and non_existing_line_ids:
   230	            raise NonExistingCheckoutLines(non_existing_line_ids)
   231	
   232	        new_variant_listing_map = {
   233	            listing.variant_id: listing
   234	            for listing in product_models.ProductVariantChannelListing.objects.filter(
   235	                channel_id=channel.id, variant_id__in=new_variant_ids
   236	            )
   237	        }
   238	
   239	        to_create: list[CheckoutLine] = []
   240	        to_update: list[CheckoutLine] = []
   241	        to_delete: list[CheckoutLine] = []
   242	
   243	        for line_data in checkout_lines_data:
   244	            line = lines_by_id.get(line_data.line_id) if line_data.line_id else None
   245	            if line:
   246	                _append_line_to_update(to_update, to_delete, line_data, replace, line)
   247	                _append_line_to_delete(to_delete, line_data, line)
   248	            else:
   249	                variant = variants_map[line_data.variant_id]
   250	                _append_line_to_create(
   251	                    to_create, checkout, variant, line_data, new_variant_listing_map
   252	                )
   253	
   254	        if to_delete:
   255	            checkout_lines_bulk_delete([line.pk for line in to_delete])
   256	
   257	        if to_update:
   258	            checkout_lines_bulk_update(
   259	                to_update, ["quantity", "price_override", "metadata"]
   260	            )

   110	def _process_voucher_data_for_order(checkout_info: "CheckoutInfo") -> dict:
   111	    """Fetch, process and return voucher/discount data from checkout.
   112	
   113	    Careful! It should be called inside a transaction.
   114	    If voucher has a usage limit, it will be increased!
   115	
   116	    :raises NotApplicable: When the voucher is not applicable in the current checkout.
   117	    """
   118	    checkout = checkout_info.checkout
   119	    voucher, voucher_code = get_voucher_for_checkout_info(checkout_info, with_lock=True)
   120	
   121	    if checkout.voucher_code and not voucher_code:
   122	        msg = "Voucher expired in meantime. Order placement aborted."
   123	        raise NotApplicable(msg)
   124	
   125	    if not voucher_code or not voucher:
   126	        return {}
   127	
   128	    customer_email = cast(str, get_customer_email_for_voucher_usage(checkout_info))
   129	
   130	    _increase_checkout_voucher_usage(checkout, voucher_code, voucher, customer_email)
   131	    return {
   132	        "voucher": voucher,
   133	        "voucher_code": voucher_code.code,
   134	    }
   135	
   136	
   137	@traced_atomic_transaction()
   138	def _increase_checkout_voucher_usage(
   139	    checkout: "Checkout",
   140	    voucher_code: "VoucherCode",
   141	    voucher: "Voucher",
   142	    customer_email: str,
   143	):
   144	    # Prevent race condition when two different threads are processing the same checkout
   145	    # with limited usage voucher assigned, both threads increasing the
   146	    # voucher usage which causing `NotApplicable` error for voucher.
   147	    if checkout.is_voucher_usage_increased:
   148	        return
   149	
   150	    increase_voucher_usage(voucher, voucher_code, customer_email)
   151	    checkout.is_voucher_usage_increased = True
   152	    checkout.save(update_fields=["is_voucher_usage_increased"])
   153	
   154	
   155	@traced_atomic_transaction()
   156	def _release_checkout_voucher_usage(
   157	    checkout: "Checkout",
   158	    voucher_code: Optional["VoucherCode"],
   159	    voucher: Optional["Voucher"],
   160	    user_email: str | None,
   161	    checkout_update_fields: list[str] | None = None,
   162	):
   163	    if not checkout.is_voucher_usage_increased:
   164	        return
   165	
   166	    checkout.is_voucher_usage_increased = False
   167	    if checkout_update_fields is None:
   168	        checkout.save(update_fields=["is_voucher_usage_increased"])
   169	    else:
   170	        checkout_update_fields.append("is_voucher_usage_increased")
   171	
   172	    if voucher_code:
   173	        release_voucher_code_usage(
   174	            voucher_code,
   175	            voucher,
   176	            user_email,
   177	        )

   180	def _process_shipping_data_for_order(
   181	    checkout_info: "CheckoutInfo",
   182	    undiscounted_base_shipping_price: Money,
   183	    base_shipping_price: Money,
   184	    shipping_price: TaxedMoney,
   185	    manager: "PluginsManager",
   186	    lines: list["CheckoutLineInfo"],
   187	) -> dict[str, Any]:
   188	    """Fetch, process and return shipping data from checkout."""
   189	    delivery_method_info = checkout_info.get_delivery_method_info()
   190	    shipping_address = delivery_method_info.shipping_address
   191	
   192	    # allow saving shipping address in case the delivery method is not provided,
   193	    # but the shipping address is set
   194	    if not delivery_method_info.delivery_method:
   195	        shipping_address = checkout_info.shipping_address
   196	
   197	    if _should_store_shipping_address_in_user_addresses(
   198	        checkout_info, shipping_address
   199	    ):
   200	        user = cast(User, checkout_info.user)
   201	        shipping_address = cast(Address, shipping_address)
   202	        store_user_address(
   203	            user,
   204	            shipping_address,
   205	            AddressType.SHIPPING,
   206	            manager=manager,
   207	        )
   208	        if user.addresses.filter(pk=shipping_address.pk).exists():
   209	            shipping_address = shipping_address.get_copy()
   210	
   211	    if shipping_address and delivery_method_info.warehouse_pk:
   212	        shipping_address = shipping_address.get_copy()
   213	
   214	    shipping_method = delivery_method_info.delivery_method
   215	    is_external = getattr(shipping_method, "is_external", False)
   216	    if is_external and shipping_method:
   217	        # It is temporary solution for setting up the external shipping method
   218	        # for order. Order doesn't have any field for storing the external shipping
   219	        # method.
   220	        checkout_metadata = get_or_create_checkout_metadata(checkout_info.checkout)
   221	        checkout_metadata.store_value_in_private_metadata(
   222	            {order_delivery_context.PRIVATE_META_APP_SHIPPING_ID: shipping_method.id}
   223	        )
   224	        checkout_metadata.save()
   225	
   226	    result: dict[str, Any] = {
   227	        "undiscounted_base_shipping_price": undiscounted_base_shipping_price,
   228	        "shipping_address": shipping_address,
   229	        "base_shipping_price": base_shipping_price,
   230	        "shipping_price": shipping_price,
   231	        "weight": calculate_checkout_weight(lines),
   232	        **delivery_method_info.get_details_for_conversion_to_order(),
   233	    }
   234	
   235	    if isinstance(shipping_method, ShippingMethodData):
   236	        result.update(
   237	            {
   238	                "shipping_method_metadata": shipping_method.metadata,
   239	                "shipping_method_private_metadata": shipping_method.private_metadata,
   240	            }
   241	        )
   242	
   243	    return result
   244	
   245	
   246	def _should_store_shipping_address_in_user_addresses(
   247	    checkout_info: "CheckoutInfo", shipping_address: Optional["Address"]
   248	) -> bool:
   249	    """Determine whether the shipping address should be stored in the user's addresses.
   250	
   251	    The address should be stored if:
   252	    - the user is authenticated
   253	    - the shipping address is set
   254	    - the address is marked to be saved
   255	    - the delivery method allows storing the address as a user address
   256	    (the delivery method is not a collection point) or the delivery method is not set
   257	    """
   258	    delivery_method_info = checkout_info.get_delivery_method_info()
   259	    address_marked_to_be_saved = checkout_info.checkout.save_shipping_address
   260	    delivery_allows_storing_as_user_address = (
   261	        delivery_method_info.store_as_customer_address
   262	    )
   263	    delivery_method_not_set = not delivery_method_info.is_delivery_method_set()
   264	
   265	    save_shipping_address = address_marked_to_be_saved and (
   266	        delivery_allows_storing_as_user_address or delivery_method_not_set
   267	    )
   268	
   269	    return bool(save_shipping_address and checkout_info.user and shipping_address)
   270

   272	def _process_user_data_for_order(checkout_info: "CheckoutInfo", manager):
   273	    """Fetch, process and return shipping data from checkout."""
   274	    billing_address = checkout_info.billing_address
   275	    save_billing_address = checkout_info.checkout.save_billing_address
   276	
   277	    if checkout_info.user and billing_address and save_billing_address:
   278	        store_user_address(
   279	            checkout_info.user, billing_address, AddressType.BILLING, manager=manager
   280	        )
   281	        if checkout_info.user.addresses.filter(pk=billing_address.pk).exists():
   282	            billing_address = billing_address.get_copy()
   283	
   284	    return {
   285	        "user": checkout_info.user,
   286	        "user_email": checkout_info.get_customer_email(),
   287	        "billing_address": billing_address,
   288	        "customer_note": checkout_info.checkout.note,
   289	    }
