   123	def calculate_checkout_total_with_gift_cards(
   124	    manager: "PluginsManager",
   125	    checkout_info: "CheckoutInfo",
   126	    lines: list["CheckoutLineInfo"],
   127	    database_connection_name: str = settings.DATABASE_CONNECTION_DEFAULT_NAME,
   128	    force_update: bool = False,
   129	    allow_sync_webhooks: bool = True,
   130	) -> "TaxedMoney":
   131	    """Return the total cost of the checkout taking into account gift cards total.
   132	
   133	    Gift cards total is subtracted from total gross amount and subtracted proportionally
   134	    from total net amount.
   135	    """
   136	    total = calculate_checkout_total(
   137	        manager=manager,
   138	        checkout_info=checkout_info,
   139	        lines=lines,
   140	        database_connection_name=database_connection_name,
   141	        force_update=force_update,
   142	        allow_sync_webhooks=allow_sync_webhooks,
   143	    )
   144	
   145	    if total == zero_taxed_money(total.currency):
   146	        return total
   147	
   148	    # Calculate how many percent of total net value the total gross value is.
   149	    gross_percentage = total.gross / total.net
   150	
   151	    # Subtract gift cards value from total gross value.
   152	    total.gross -= checkout_info.checkout.get_total_gift_cards_balance(
   153	        database_connection_name
   154	    )
   155	
   156	    # Gross value cannot be below zero.
   157	    total.gross = max(total.gross, zero_money(total.currency))
   158	
   159	    # Adjusted total net value is proportional to potentially reduced total gross value.
   160	    total.net = quantize_price(total.gross / gross_percentage, total.currency)
   161	
   162	    return total

The highest-risk runtime paths are the price/stock calculators, not just schema fields. In particular, checkout and order line info wrap a variant plus a channel listing, then call `get_base_price`, `get_price`, `get_prior_price_amount`, `track_inventory`, and `is_preorder_active`; stock code mostly keys by variant id and stock rows.

   806	    def resolve_revenue(root: ChannelContext[models.ProductVariant], info, *, period):
   807	        start_date = reporting_period_to_date(period)
   808	        variant = root.node

   811	        def calculate_revenue_with_channel(channel):
   812	            if not channel:

   814	
   815	            def calculate_revenue_with_order_lines(order_lines):
   816	                def calculate_revenue_with_orders(orders):
   817	                    orders_dict = {order.id: order for order in orders}
   818	                    return calculate_revenue_for_variant(
   819	                        variant,
   820	                        start_date,
   821	                        order_lines,
   822	                        orders_dict,
   823	                        channel.currency_code,

   825

   827	                return (

   830	                    .then(calculate_revenue_with_orders)
   831	                )
   832

   859	    def resolve_preorder(root: ChannelContext[models.ProductVariant], info):
   860	        variant = root.node
   861	
   862	        variant_channel_listings = VariantChannelListingByVariantIdLoader(
   863	            info.context
   864	        ).load(variant.id)
   865	
   866	        def calculate_global_sold_units(variant_channel_listings):
   867	            global_sold_units = sum(
   868	                channel_listing.preorder_quantity_allocated
   869	                for channel_listing in variant_channel_listings
   870	            )
   871	            return (
   872	                PreorderData(
   873	                    global_threshold=variant.preorder_global_threshold,
   874	                    global_sold_units=global_sold_units,
   875	                    end_date=variant.preorder_end_date,
   876	                )
   877	                if variant.is_preorder_active()
   878	                else None
   879	            )
   880	
   881	        return variant_channel_listings.then(calculate_global_sold_units)

   883	    @staticmethod
   884	    def __resolve_references(roots: list["ProductVariant"], info):
   885	        requestor = get_user_or_app_from_context(info.context)
   886	
   887	        channels = defaultdict(set)
   888	        roots_ids = []
   889	        for root in roots:
   890	            roots_ids.append(f"{root.channel}_{root.id}")
   891	            channels[root.channel].add(root.id)
   892	
   893	        variants = {}
   894	        database_connection_name = get_database_connection_name(info.context)
   895	        channels_map = Channel.objects.using(database_connection_name).in_bulk(
   896	            set(channels.keys()), field_name="slug"
   897	        )
   898	        for channel_slug, ids in channels.items():
   899	            limited_channel_access = False if channel_slug is None else True
   900	            qs = resolve_product_variants(
   901	                info,
   902	                requestor,
   903	                ids=ids,
   904	                channel=channels_map.get(channel_slug),
   905	                limited_channel_access=limited_channel_access,
   906	            ).qs
   907	            for variant in qs:
   908	                global_id = graphene.Node.to_global_id("ProductVariant", variant.id)
   909	                variants[f"{channel_slug}_{global_id}"] = ChannelContext(
   910	                    channel_slug=channel_slug, node=variant
   911	                )
   912	
   913	        return [variants.get(root_id) for root_id in roots_ids]
